en_description:
Perform a 5-hit melee combo in front of you, dealing 10/10/10/15/30 damage.
☆
Perform a 5-hit melee combo in front of you
Hit 1: Thrust (10).
Hit 2: Slash (10). 
Hit 3: Kick (10). 
Hit 4: Slash (15). 
Hit 5: Cross Cut (15x2).
cn_description:
对前方进行五段近战攻击，
造成10/10/10/15/30点伤害。
☆
对前方进行五段近战攻击，
1 - 戳刺，造成10点伤害。
2 - 劈砍，造成10点伤害。
3 - 踢，造成10点伤害。
4 - 劈砍，造成15点伤害。
5 - 十字斩，造成15x2点伤害。

en_description: Throw 3 knives, each dealing 20 damage. Costs 3 Energy.
cn_description: 发射3把飞刀，每把造成20点伤害，消耗3点能量。

en_description: Dash forward. Attacking during the dash deals 15 damage.
cn_description: 向前突进，如果在冲刺时攻击，造成15点伤害。

en_description: Gain 20% increased Melee Damage and 30% Attack Speed for 7 seconds. Cooldown: 16s.
cn_description: 通过怒吼激励自己，提升20%的近战攻击力和30%的攻击速度，持续7秒。冷却时间16秒。

en_description: On cast, deal 100 damage to nearby enemies and Stun them for 2s.
cn_description: 技能施放时对周围的敌人造成100点伤害，并附加2秒眩晕。

en_description: Gain 30% Melee Critical Chance during the effect.
cn_description: 在持续时间内，提高30%近战攻击的暴击率。

en_description: Cooldown reduced by 5s.
cn_description: 冷却时间减少5秒。

en_description: Energy regeneration increased by 200% during the effect.
cn_description: 在持续时间内，提高200%的能量回复速度。

en_description: Each enemy kill extends the duration by 0.8s.
cn_description: 每击杀一个敌人，将持续时间延长0.8秒。

en_description: Attack Speed bonus becomes 180%, then decays to 30% over 4 seconds.
cn_description: 使用后，提升的攻击速度变为180%，并在4秒内逐渐衰减至30%。

en_description: Dash in a chosen direction, becoming untargetable during the dash. Summon shadows that perform 6 piercing strikes along the path, each dealing 40 damage. Cooldown: 9s.
cn_description: 选择一个方向冲刺，冲刺期间无法被敌人选取，并召唤影子对路径上的敌人进行6段戳刺攻击，每段造成40点伤害。冷却时间9秒。

en_description: Summoned shadow count increased by 3.
cn_description: 技能召唤的影子数量增加3。

en_description: Gain 5 Shield for 6 seconds after casting.
cn_description: 技能施放后获得5点护盾，护盾持续6秒。

en_description: Piercing strikes Cripple enemies on hit.
cn_description: 戳刺命中时附加残废。

en_description: Shadow attack range increased by 100%, damage increased by 25.
cn_description: 每个影子的攻击范围提高100%，伤害增加25点。

en_description: Final strike deals 800% damage and Stuns for 2.5s.
cn_description: 技能最后现身时的戳刺伤害提升至800%，并附加2.5秒眩晕。

en_description: No longer dash. Only summon shadows. Cooldown reduced by 2s. Stores 2 charges.
cn_description: 不再进行位移，只召唤影子进行戳刺。冷却时间减少2秒，可以存储2次充能。

en_description: After a brief charge, unleash 3 blade waves in a forward cone. Charging increases waves up to 7 after 1.5s. Each wave deals 40 damage. Cooldown: 10s.
cn_description: 短暂蓄力后，向前方扇形区域斩出3道刀波，刀波数量会随蓄力时间增加，最多蓄力1.5秒并发出7道刀波。每道刀波造成40点伤害。冷却时间10秒。

en_description: Charge speed increased by 100%.
cn_description: 蓄力速度提高100%。

en_description: Wave distance increases by 40% with charge time. Damage to distant enemies increased up to 100%.
cn_description: 刀波距离会随蓄力时间增加40%，并且对更远处的敌人造成的伤害会提高，最多提高100%。

en_description: Instant cast refunds 50% Cooldown.
cn_description: 瞬间施放时，返还50%的冷却时间。

en_description: Each hit on the same target increases damage by 10.
cn_description: 对同一个目标每命中一个刀波，伤害增加10点。

en_description: Casting at full charge releases 6 additional waves.
cn_description: 刚好蓄满时，刀波数量增加6。

en_description: Gain 16 Shield at the start of charging, decaying over 3s.
cn_description: 蓄力开始时获得16点护盾，在3秒内逐渐衰减。

en_description: Fire a steel chain that deals 40 damage and Stuns for 1s. Hitting an enemy or terrain pulls you forward, performing a spinning slash that deals 50 damage. Cooldown: 6s.
cn_description:
发射一道铁索，命中敌人时造成40点伤害并附加1秒眩晕。
钩中敌人或墙体后，会迅速拉向目标，并在飞行过程中施放回旋斩，对周围敌人造成50点伤害。
冷却时间6秒。

en_description: Hitting terrain refunds 70% Cooldown.
cn_description: 钩中墙壁时返还70%的冷却时间。

en_description: Direct hits deal +60 damage.
cn_description: 铁索直接命中敌人时，伤害增加60点。

en_description: Direct hits apply 4 stacks of Wound.
cn_description: 铁索直接命中敌人时，附加4层伤口。

en_description: Spinning slash damage +25, radius +60%.
cn_description: 回旋斩的伤害增加25点，伤害范围扩大60%。

en_description: Cooldown reduced by 2s. Stores 2 charges.
cn_description: 冷却时间减少2秒，可以存储2次充能。

en_description: No longer dash. Pull enemies to your position and Stun for 2s.
cn_description: 不再向目标冲刺，而是命中敌人时将敌人拉至施放位置并附加2秒眩晕。

en_description: Consume 3 Energy to throw 3 poisoned daggers forward.They can pierce through up to 1 enemy, dealing 30 damage and applying 2 stacks of Poison to each target. Cooldown: 8s.
cn_description: 消耗3点能量，向前方投掷3把淬毒飞刀，飞刀可以穿透最多1个敌人，对每个目标造成30点伤害并附加2层中毒。冷却时间8秒。

en_description: Direct damage increased by 35.
cn_description: 直接伤害增加35点。

en_description: Each knife applies +1 Poison.
cn_description: 每把淬毒飞刀附加的中毒层数增加1层。

en_description: If Energy is above 50%, throw 3 additional knives.
cn_description: 如果使用时能量超过一半，淬毒飞刀数量增加3。

en_description: Knife pierce count increased by 2.
cn_description: 淬毒飞刀的穿透数量增加2。

en_description: Throwing knives directly casts Poison Blade Rain. Energy Cost +2.
cn_description: 投掷飞刀时，直接施放毒刃暴雨。能量消耗+2。

en_description: Enter Stealth for 3s after casting.
cn_description: 施放技能后进入潜行，持续3秒。

en_description: Consume 2 Energy to throw knives around you, dealing 50 damage. After casting, 3 knives drop on the ground nearby. Cooldown: 4s.
cn_description: 消耗2点能量，向周围投掷飞刀，对周围敌人造成50点伤害。施放技能后，3把飞刀将掉落在附近地面上。冷却时间4秒。

en_description: Dropped knife count increased by 4.
cn_description: 掉落在附近的飞刀数增加4。

en_description: Stores 3 charges.
cn_description: 技能可以存储3次充能。

en_description: Hitting at least 4 enemies reduces Cooldown by 3s.
cn_description: 命中了至少4个敌人时，冷却时间减少3秒。

en_description: Damage increases against closer enemies, up to 180%.
cn_description: 对越近的敌人造成的伤害会提高，最高提高180%。

en_description: Base damage +30. Repeated hits deal +9 damage, stacking up to 7 times.
cn_description: 基础伤害增加30点，同一个敌人每次受到刀扇伤害时，再受到9点伤害，最多叠加7层。

en_description: Dash briefly before releasing Fan of Blades. Cooldown reduced by 1.5s.
cn_description: 施放技能时，先进行一次快速位移，再释放刀扇。冷却时间减少1.5秒。

en_description: Throw a smoke bomb at your feet for 3s. Every 0.6s, a shadow clone attacks once. While not attacking inside smoke, enter Stealth. Cooldown: 15s.
cn_description: 在脚下投掷一个烟雾弹，烟雾持续3秒。每0.6秒召唤影分身在烟雾中攻击一次。在烟雾中未攻击时，进入隐身。冷却时间15秒。

en_description: Enemies inside smoke are Slowed by 65%.
cn_description: 烟雾中的敌人移动速度减少65%。

en_description: Apply 3 Poison per second to enemies inside smoke.
cn_description: 每秒对烟雾中的敌人附加3层中毒。

en_description: Cooldown reduced by 4s.
cn_description: 冷却时间减少4秒。

en_description: Energy regeneration increased by 300% inside smoke.
cn_description: 在烟雾中，能量恢复速度提升300%。

en_description: Shadow clone attack speed increased by 150%.
cn_description: 影分身的攻击频率提高150%。

en_description: Duration +2.5s. No longer summon shadow attacks.
cn_description: 持续时间增加2.5秒，不再召唤影分身攻击。

en_description: Dash to target location, then stab toward the nearest enemy 4 times. Each stab deals 30 AoE damage. Cooldown: 8s.
cn_description: 快速冲向目标位置，然后朝最近的敌人方向戳刺4次。每次戳刺造成30点范围伤害。冷却时间8秒。

en_description: Stores 3 charges.
cn_description: 技能可以存储3次充能。

en_description: Hits apply 2s Stun.
cn_description: 命中敌人时，附加2秒眩晕。

en_description: Stab range increased by 75%.
cn_description: 戳刺距离提高75%。

en_description: Backstab damage increased by 200%.
cn_description: 戳刺造成的背刺伤害提高200%。

en_description: Stab count increased by 3.
cn_description: 戳刺次数增加3。

en_description: (Passive) Dashing has a 30% chance to summon a shadow to stab the nearest enemy.
cn_description: （被动）冲刺时，有30%的几率召唤影子向最近的敌人进行一次戳刺。

en_description: Summons a lightning bolt, dealing 55 damage to enemies in an area and linking them together for 2.5 seconds. Cooldown: 11s.
cn_description: 召唤一道闪电，对范围内的敌人造成55点伤害，并将这些敌人链接在一起，持续2.5秒。冷却时间11秒。

en_description: Cooldown reduced by 3.5s.
cn_description: 冷却时间减少3.5秒。

en_description: Area increased by 40%.
cn_description: 技能范围提高40%。

en_description: Damage increased by 40.
cn_description: 闪电伤害增加40点。

en_description: Applies Armor Break for 2.5s.
cn_description: 技能同时附加破甲，持续2.5秒。

en_description: When lightning hits, reduce other skill cooldowns by 4s.
cn_description: 闪电击中你时，使其他技能的冷却时间减少4秒。

en_description: Increases the duration of links by 3.5 seconds.
cn_description: 链接的持续时间增加3.5秒。

en_description: Dash forward and slash. Can be recast within 3.5s, up to 3 times, dealing 25/40/55 damage. Cooldown: 12s.
cn_description: 向前冲刺斩击，在3.5秒内可再次施放，总共可施放3段。对攻击到的敌人造成25/40/55点伤害。冷却时间12秒。

en_description: Dash forward and slash. Can be recast within 3.5s, up to 3 times, dealing 25/40/55 damage. Cooldown: 12s.
cn_description: 向前冲刺斩击，在3.5秒内可再次施放，总共可施放3段。对攻击到的敌人造成25/40/55点伤害。冷却时间12秒。

en_description: Dash forward and slash. Can be recast within 3.5s, up to 3 times, dealing 25/40/55 damage. Cooldown: 12s.
cn_description: 向前冲刺斩击，在3.5秒内可再次施放，总共可施放3段。对攻击到的敌人造成25/40/55点伤害。冷却时间12秒。

en_description: Critical Chance increased by 25%.
cn_description: 此技能的暴击率提高25%。

en_description: Cooldown reduced by 4s.
cn_description: 冷却时间降低4秒。

en_description: Dealing damage grants 5 Shield for 1.5s.
cn_description: 技能造成伤害时，获得5点护盾，持续1.5秒。

en_description: Third slash Stuns for 3s.
cn_description: 第三段技能附加持续3秒的眩晕。

en_description: When HP is below 12%, the third hit restores 8 HP on hit.
cn_description: 生命值小于12%时，第三段技能命中时可以回复8点生命值。

en_description: Third dash range increased, damage increased by 150%.
cn_description: 第三段技能的冲刺距离提高，伤害提高150%。

en_description: Continuously throw knives toward target direction, firing 12 knives per second, each dealing 32 damage. Costs 4 Energy per second. Ends when Energy is depleted. Move at 25% speed while channeling. Cooldown: 14s.
cn_description:
向目标方向连续投掷飞刀，每秒发射12枚飞刀，每枚造成32点伤害。
每秒消耗4点能量。能量耗尽时，停止施放。施放其他技能时，停止施放。施放需要至少4点能量。
投掷期间，移动速度降低至25%。冷却时间14秒。

en_description: Killing enemies restores 2 Energy.
cn_description: 击杀敌人时，回复2点能量。

en_description: Fires 15 knives per second.
cn_description: 每秒发射数量提高到15发。

en_description: Move at 75% speed while channeling.
cn_description: 施放期间，移动速度提高到75%。

en_description: Cannot move while channeling. Critical Chance increased by 35%.
cn_description: 施放期间，不再能移动或冲刺。此技能的暴击率提高35%。

en_description: When stopped due to Energy depletion, fire 12 knives in a forward cone.
cn_description: 因能量耗尽而停止施放时，向前方扇形区域发射12发飞刀。

en_description: Cooldown reduced to 4s.
cn_description: 冷却时间降低到4秒。

en_description: Cleave enemies ahead for 135 base damage. Killing an enemy reduces Cooldown to 3s. Cooldown: 14s.
cn_description: 重劈前方敌人，造成135点基础伤害。造成击杀时，冷却时间降低到3秒。冷却时间14秒。

en_description: Each stack of Wound increases damage by 20.
cn_description: 敌人身上的每层伤口使伤害提高20点。

en_description: Instantly kill enemies below 12% HP.
cn_description: 此技能会直接杀死生命值小于12%的敌人。

en_description: Each kill permanently increases base damage by 0.5.
cn_description: 此技能击杀敌人时，永久增加0.5点基础伤害。

en_description: Damage radius is increased by 35% and inflicts 2 seconds of Fear on all enemies hit.
cn_description: 伤害范围扩大35%。并对命中的所有敌人附加2秒恐惧。

en_description: On kill, gain 75% Attack Speed and 15% Move Speed for 3s.
cn_description: 此技能击杀敌人时，攻击速度提高75%，移动速度提高15%，持续3秒。

en_description: Cooldown reduced to 5s.
cn_description: 冷却时间降低到5秒。

en_description: Leap to target location, dealing 110 damage in an X-shaped area and Stunning for 1.5s. Cooldown: 9s.
cn_description: 跳跃到目标位置，对X型范围内的敌人造成110点伤害，并附加1.5秒眩晕。冷却时间9秒。

en_description: Enemies at the center take damage twice.
cn_description: 对十字中心的敌人造成两次伤害。

en_description: Base damage +30. Area of effect increased by 30%.
cn_description: 基础伤害+30，作用范围扩大30%。

en_description: Critical Chance increased by 35%.
cn_description: 技能暴击率提高35%。

en_description: Hit enemies are Linked for 5s.
cn_description: 命中的敌人被链接在一起，持续5秒。

en_description: Leave a shadow that repeats the skill after 2.5s, dealing 50% damage and Stunning for 1s.
cn_description: 施放技能时留下一个影子，在2.5秒后重复施放一次技能，造成50%伤害并附加1秒眩晕

en_description: Enemy deaths nearby reduce Cooldown by 1s.
cn_description: 周围敌人死亡时，技能冷却时间减少1秒。

en_description: Flying kick forward, dealing 90 damage to the first enemy and 50% damage to nearby enemies. Jump backward after hit and restore 4 Energy. Cooldown: 6.5s.
cn_description: 朝目标方向飞踢，对命中的首个目标造成90点伤害，对周围的敌人造成50%伤害。命中后迅速向后跳跃，并回复4点能量。冷却时间6.5秒。

en_description: AoE damage increased to 100%.
cn_description: 对周围敌人的伤害提高到100%。

en_description: Stores 3 charges.
cn_description: 技能可以存储3次充能。

en_description: Close-range hits apply Armor Break for 5s.
cn_description: 近距离施放并命中敌人时，将敌人额外击退并附加破甲，持续5秒。

en_description: Damage increased by 40.
cn_description: 伤害增加40点。

en_description: Energy restored increased by 2.
cn_description: 技能回复的能量提高2点。

en_description: Critical hits reset Cooldown.
cn_description: 暴击时，重置此技能的冷却时间。

en_description: Summon 3 blades that orbit you, dealing 14 damage on contact. Lasts 4s. Cooldown: 15s.
cn_description: 召唤3个飞刃环绕自身旋转，触碰敌人时造成14点伤害。持续4秒。冷却时间15秒。

en_description: Blade count +1.
cn_description: 飞刃数量增加1。

en_description: When the blade returns to you, Energy is fully restored.
cn_description: 飞刃回到自身时，回满能量。

en_description: Cooldown reduced by 5s.
cn_description: 冷却时间减少5秒。

en_description: Damage taken reduced by 20% while active.
cn_description: 被飞刃环绕时，承受伤害减少20%。

en_description: Blades no longer follow movement. Duration +3s.
cn_description: 飞刃不再跟随移动。技能持续时间+3秒。

en_description: Each kill increases spin speed by 20%.
cn_description: 持续期间，每击杀一个敌人时，旋转速度提高20%。

en_description: Throws a mass of dark mist to a target location, forming a shadow.The shadow has 28 base Attack, automatically pursues nearby enemies, and lasts 6 seconds. This skill stores 2 charges. Cooldown: 8s.
cn_description: 向目标位置投掷一团黑雾，形成一个影子。影子拥有28点基础攻击力，自动追击附近的敌人，持续6秒。技能可以存储2次充能。冷却时间8秒。

en_description: Summoning deals 70 damage and applies Cripple for 2.5s.
cn_description: 召唤影子时，黑雾造成70点伤害，并附加残废，持续2.5秒。

en_description: The shadow's Attack Speed is increased by 35%.
cn_description: 影子的攻击速度提高35%。

en_description: Shadows throw knives instead. Cooldown: 4s.
cn_description: 影子向敌人投掷飞刀。冷却时间4秒。

en_description: Cooldown reduced by 1 second. This skill can store up to 3 charges.
cn_description: 冷却时间减少1秒，技能可以存储3次。

en_description: Duration +7s. Summoning costs +2 Energy.
cn_description: 影子持续时间增加7秒，召唤时额外消耗2点能量。

en_description: (Passive) Every 12 Energy spent summons a shadow to assist.
cn_description: （被动）每消耗12点能量时，召唤一个影分身在身边协助作战。

en_description: Coat your weapon with poison, causing melee attacks to apply 1 Poison for 4.25s. Cooldown: 18s.
cn_description: 为武器涂毒，使接下来4.25秒内所有近战攻击附加2层中毒。冷却时间18秒。

en_description: Cooldown reduced by 5s.
cn_description: 冷却时间减少5秒。

en_description: First melee hit applies 8 extra Poison.
cn_description: 涂毒后的首次近战攻击额外附加8层中毒。

en_description: Melee attacks apply +1 Poison
cn_description: 近战攻击附加的中毒层数增加1层。

en_description: Throwing knives apply 1 Poison while active.
cn_description: 涂毒状态下，飞刀造成伤害时附加1层中毒。

en_description: Taking damage releases poison mist, applying Cripple and 6 Poison.
cn_description: 涂毒状态下，受到攻击时，释放一片毒雾，对周围的敌人附加残废，并附加6层中毒。

en_description: Each Poison stack increases melee damage by 12%.
cn_description: 涂毒状态下，敌人身上的每层中毒使对其造成的近战伤害提高12%。

en_description: Unleash a blade wave that continuously travels forward for 7 seconds. It ricochets upon hitting a wall. The wave deals 45 damage on contact and applies 1 stack of Wound. Cooldown: 12 seconds.
cn_description: 发出一道不断向前推进的刀波，持续7秒。撞到墙时，反弹。刀波触碰敌人时造成45点伤害，并附加1层伤口。冷却时间12秒。

en_description: Applies +1 additional Wound stack.
cn_description: 附加伤口增加1层。

en_description: Damage increased by 24.
cn_description: 伤害提高24点。

en_description: Stores 3 charges.
cn_description: 技能可以存储3次。

en_description: Projectile speed +40%. First hit deals +45 damage.
cn_description: 弹道速度提高40%，首次命中一个目标时造成额外45点伤害。

en_description: After bouncing, duration +5s.
cn_description: 撞墙反弹后持续时间延长5秒。

en_description: Explosion leaves a patch of fire that lasts for 2 seconds.
cn_description: 爆炸后留下一滩持续2秒的火焰。

en_description: Chain-detonated bombs deal +50% damage (stacks, repeatable).
cn_description: 被连锁引爆的炸弹提高50%伤害，可以重复叠加。

en_description: Cooldown reduced by 3s.
cn_description: 冷却时间减少3秒。

en_description: Enemies at the explosion center take 2.5x damage.
cn_description: 爆炸中心的敌人受到2.5倍伤害。

en_description: Throw a packed explosive canister, dealing 140 explosion damage and Igniting the ground for 2s. Cooldown: 16s.
cn_description: 丢出一个精心准备的炸药罐，造成140点爆炸伤害。并点燃地面持续2秒。冷却时间16秒。

en_description: Direct hits also deal an extra Thunderstrike hit.
cn_description: 炸药罐直接命中的敌人会额外受到一次霹雳伤害。

en_description: Cooldown -4.5s.
cn_description: 技能冷却时间-4.5秒。

en_description: Damage applies a 2s Stun.
cn_description: 造成伤害时附加持续2秒的眩晕。

en_description: Critical Chance +35%.
cn_description: 技能暴击率+35%

en_description: Burning duration +6s.
cn_description: 燃烧时间+6秒。

en_description: Explosion damage +140, but hitting yourself deals 15% damage to you.
cn_description: 爆炸伤害+140，但是不小心打中自己的话会对自己造成15%的伤害。

en_description:
Throw a sticky oil bomb that creates a patch of flammable oil at the target location. 
The oil lasts up to 6s. Cooldown: 8.5s.
cn_description: 丢出一枚粘油弹，在目标地点覆盖一片燃油。燃油最多持续6秒。冷却时间8.5秒。

en_description: Direct hits deal an additional 70 damage.
cn_description: 直接命中时会额外造成70点伤害。

en_description: +1 Skill Charge. Cooldown -2s.
cn_description: 技能储存次数+1，冷却时间-2秒。

en_description: Direct hits Stun for 1.5s.
cn_description: 直接命中时会造成持续1.5秒的眩晕。

en_description: Oil area is increased. Duration +1.5s.
cn_description: 燃油范围变大，持续时间增长1.5秒。

en_description: If the oil bomb hits you, gain 50 Armor for 6s.
cn_description: 如果燃油桶命中自己，接下来6秒获得50护甲。

en_description: Hitting the oil bomb mid-air with a projectile detonates it instantly, dealing an additional 150 damage.
cn_description: 用炮弹在空中命中燃油桶可以马上引爆造成额外的150点伤害。

en_description: Spray flames for 2s, dealing 60 damage per second and Igniting enemies. You can move at 40% speed while firing. Cooldown: 12s.
cn_description:
在2秒内持续的向敌人喷射火焰，每秒造成60点伤害并持续点燃敌人。
喷火时可以以40%的移动速度缓慢移动。冷却时间12秒。

en_description: Damage per second +35.
cn_description: 每秒伤害+35点。

en_description: Flame width +40%.
cn_description: 火焰范围增加+40%。

en_description: Gain 10 Shield while active.
cn_description: 喷火装置启动期间获得10点护盾值。

en_description: Max duration +1.6s.
cn_description: 最大持续时间+1.6秒。

en_description: After firing, automatically load 4 Incendiary rounds.
cn_description: 喷火后，自动4发燃烧弹。

en_description: Canceling early refunds cooldown proportionally (up to 60%).
cn_description: 如果喷火时中途取消，会按比例返还一定的冷却时间，最多返还60%

en_description: Deploy a turret with 1.8 attacks per second. It fires Burst Rounds at 50% damage. Lasts 8s. Cooldown: 10s.
cn_description:
放置一座炮台。炮台拥有1.8次/秒的攻击速度。使用50%伤害的连发弹进行攻击。
炮台持续8秒，冷却时间10秒。

en_description: Base damage +35%.
cn_description: 基础伤害提升35%。

en_description: Charge limit +2.
cn_description: 存储次数+2。

en_description: Turret range +50%.
cn_description: 速射炮台的射程提高50%。

en_description: When the turret expires, it explodes for 80 damage to nearby enemies.
cn_description: 炮台持续时间结束时会爆炸，对周围的敌人造成80点伤害。

en_description: After building, turret gains +150% Attack Speed for 2.25s.
cn_description: 建造后炮台立即获得+150%攻速，持续2.25秒。

en_description: Turret can be thrown to a distant spot, dealing 75 damage and briefly Stunning on landing.
cn_description: 炮台可以向远处投掷，落地时对周围的敌人造成75点伤害和短暂的眩晕。

en_description: Deploy a turret that fires Shells at 75% damage with 1.1 attacks per second. Lasts 6s. Cooldown: 6s. Stores 2 charges.
cn_description:
放置一座炮台。使用75%伤害的炮弹进行攻击，炮台拥有1.1/秒的攻击速度，
炮台持续6秒，冷却时间6秒。技能可以储存2次。

en_description: Attack Speed +40%.
cn_description: 基础射速提高40%。

en_description: Charge limit +3.
cn_description: 存储次数+3。

en_description: Turret range +50%.
cn_description: 加农炮台的射程提高50%。

en_description: When the turret expires, it explodes for 80 damage to nearby enemies.
cn_description: 炮台持续时间结束时会爆炸，对周围的敌人造成80点伤害。

en_description: Forge upgrade limit +3.
cn_description: 炮台的可被锻造升级次数+3。

en_description: Turret can be thrown to a distant spot, dealing 75 damage and briefly Stunning on landing.
cn_description: 炮台可以向远处投掷，落地时对周围的敌人造成75点伤害和短暂的眩晕。

en_description: Deploy a turret with 0.5 attacks per second, firing Grenades at 100% damage. Lasts 8.5s. Cooldown: 15s.
cn_description:
放置一座炮台，炮台拥有0.5/秒的攻击速度，使用100%伤害的榴弹进行攻击。
持续8.5秒，冷却时间15秒。

en_description: Turret attacks have a 35% chance to fire twice.
cn_description: 炮台攻击时有35%的几率可以连射2次。

en_description: Charge limit +2.
cn_description: 存储次数+2。

en_description: Critical Chance +30%.
cn_description: 榴弹炮台的暴击率+30%。

en_description: When the turret expires, it explodes for 80 damage to nearby enemies.
cn_description: 炮台持续时间结束时会爆炸，对周围的敌人造成80点伤害。

en_description: Turret range +150%.
cn_description: 榴弹炮台的射程提高150%。

en_description: Turret can be thrown to a distant spot, dealing 75 damage and briefly Stunning on landing.
cn_description: 炮台可以向远处投掷，落地时对周围的敌人造成75点伤害和短暂的眩晕。

en_description: Hop slightly and slam the ground with a smith's hammer, dealing 105 damage and briefly Stunning. Leaves a thunder field for 3s: enemies inside have a 30% chance to take a Thunderstrike hit whenever they are attacked. Hitting a turret applies 1 Forge stack. Cooldown: 11.5s.
cn_description:
小幅跳跃后用铁匠锤砸向地面。造成105点伤害和短暂的眩晕。
然后在地面上留下一个雷霆领域，持续3秒。其中的敌人每次受到攻击时有30%的几率承受一次霹雳伤害。锤子命中炮台会附加1层锻造效果。冷却时间11.5秒。

en_description: Cooldown -2.5s.
cn_description: 冷却时间-2.5秒。

en_description: Thunder field duration +1.5s.
cn_description: 雷霆领域的持续时间延长1.5秒。

en_description: Enemies in the field are Slowed by 25%.
cn_description: 雷霆领域内的敌人减速25%。

en_description: Forge stacks applied +2.
cn_description: 锻造效果+2。

en_description: Every 0.85s, a Thunderstrike automatically hits a random enemy in the area.
cn_description: 区域内每隔0.85秒自动在随机敌人身上降下霹雳。

en_description: Gain 12 Shield for 3s after casting.
cn_description: 技能施放后获得12点护盾，持续3秒。

en_description: Rush forward, grab the first enemy, and toss it behind you. The landing impact deals 75 damage and briefly Stuns nearby enemies. Cooldown: 5.5s.
cn_description:
向前突进，抓住第一个敌人将它投掷到自己身后，
对落点周围的敌人造成75点伤害与短暂的眩晕。冷却时间5.5秒。

en_description: Enemies at the landing point also suffer Armor Break for 2s.
cn_description: 落点的敌人还会附加持续2秒的破甲。

en_description: Stores 3 charges.
cn_description: 技能现在可以储存3次。

en_description: The thrown target is Stunned for 2.5s.
cn_description: 被抛起的目标会被眩晕2.5秒。

en_description: Cooldown reduced by 1.2s.
cn_description: 冷却时间降低1.2秒。

en_description: If you hit only one target, deal 2.4x damage.
cn_description: 如果只命中了一个目标，造成2.4倍伤害。

en_description: Throw height +200%. Damage +35 and area +40%.
cn_description: 投掷高度提升200%。造成的伤害+35，伤害范围提高40%。

en_description: Swap to a magazine loaded with 4 Grenade rounds. Cooldown: 12s.
cn_description: 更换一个只装填了4发榴弹的弹夹。冷却时间12秒。

en_description: Cooldown -4s.
cn_description: 冷却时间-4秒。

en_description: Fire Rate +40% while this magazine is equipped.
cn_description: 使用此弹夹的射速+40%。

en_description: Reload becomes instant.
cn_description: 上弹将瞬间完成。

en_description: Damage +35% for this magazine's shots.
cn_description: 此弹夹的子弹造成的伤害+35%。

en_description: Magazine size +2 Grenades.
cn_description: 装填的榴弹数量+2。

en_description: Your first shot after casting is guaranteed to Crit.
cn_description: 施放技能后的首次射击必定暴击。

en_description: Fire a rocket that explodes on hit, dealing 60 damage in an area and briefly Stunning. Direct hits are guaranteed to Crit. Stores up to 3 rockets. Cooldown: 6s.
cn_description: 向目标方向发射火箭，命中敌人后爆炸，对一定范围内的敌方单位造成60点的伤害和短暂的眩晕，对直接命中的敌人造成的伤害必定暴击。技能最多储存3发。冷却时间6秒。

en_description: Charge limit +2.
cn_description: 存储次数+2。

en_description: Critical Damage +40%.
cn_description: 暴击伤害+40%。

en_description: Explosion radius +50%.
cn_description: 爆炸范围+50%

en_description: Damage increases with travel distance, up to 180%.
cn_description: 伤害随飞行距离提升，最多提升至180%。

en_description: Every 2 rockets fired, the next rocket has 100 base damage and applies a 3.5s Stun.
cn_description: 每发射2发飞弹，下一发飞弹提升到100点基础伤害，并附加持续3.5秒的眩晕。

en_description: On hit, reduce all skill cooldowns by 0.6s.
cn_description: 技能命中时，全部技能的冷却时间-0.6秒。

en_description: Swing the smith's hammer in a wide sweep, dealing 85 damage and heavy Knockback. Enemies can be chain-launched. Chain-launched enemies take 85 damage. Hitting a turret applies 1 Forge stack. Cooldown: 7.5s.
cn_description: 用铁匠锤横扫前方的所有敌人。造成85点伤害和大幅的击退。敌人会被连锁击飞。被连锁击飞的敌人会受到85点伤害。命中炮台会附加1层锻造效果。冷却7.5秒。

en_description: Forge stacks applied to turrets +1.
cn_description: 命中炮台时赋予的锻造层数+1。

en_description: Knockback distance +30%, and chain-launch damage +50.
cn_description: 击飞距离加30%，被连锁击飞的目标受到的伤害+50。

en_description: Enemies hit by the direct strike suffer Armor Break.
cn_description: 受到直接伤害的敌人被破甲。

en_description: Gain 6 Shield for 4s per enemy directly hit.
cn_description: 每直接命中1个单位，获得6点护盾值，持续4秒。

en_description: If you affect more than 4 units, refund 65% Cooldown.
cn_description: 如果技能影响了超过4个单位，返还65%冷却时间。

en_description: Direct hits also deal 8% of enemy max HP as bonus damage (3% vs bosses).
cn_description: 直接命中时会额外造成相当于敌人8%最大生命值的伤害（对BOSS降低到3%）。

en_description: Throw a flashbang that deals 40 damage in an area and applies 1 Mark to all enemies hit. After exploding, it bounces forward once and explodes again. Cooldown: 9s.
cn_description: 投掷一枚闪光雷，对一定范围内的全部敌人造成40点伤害并在他他们身上附加1层标记，闪光雷爆炸后可以再向前弹射一次。冷却时间9秒。

en_description: Adds 1 additional bounce.
cn_description: 技能再额外弹跳1次。

en_description: Also Blinds enemies for 5s.
cn_description: 造成伤害时还会使敌人致盲5秒。

en_description: Mark stacks applied +2.
cn_description: 附加的标记层数+2。

en_description: On hit, call down a Thunderstrike on a random enemy in the damage area.
cn_description: 命中时降下一道霹雳，攻击伤害范围内的随机敌人。

en_description: Cooldown -3s.
cn_description: 冷却时间-3。

en_description: The final explosion also Stuns for 3s.
cn_description: 最后一次爆炸时附加持续3秒的眩晕

en_description: Surge your body with electricity, gaining 65% Melee Attack Speed for 6s. While active, you cannot use shooting or cards. Cooldown: 20s.
cn_description:
使用电流激发身体潜能，提高65%近战攻速，持续6秒，
状态持续期间内无法使用射击和魔卡。冷却时间20秒。

en_description: Attack Speed bonus +40%.
cn_description: 攻速增幅提高40%。

en_description: Gain 20 Shield on cast, decaying over 4s.
cn_description: 施放技能时获得20点护盾，在4秒内衰减。

en_description: While active, become immune to control effects and gain 12% damage reduction.
cn_description: 状态持续期间你处于控制免疫状态，并获得12%的伤害减免。

en_description: While active, fire a Chain Lightning at a random nearby enemy every 1.25s.
cn_description: 状态持续期间，每隔1.25秒会自动向周围的随机敌人发射一道闪电链。

en_description: Duration +4s, but you are Paralyzed for 1s when it ends.
cn_description: 持续时间+4。但是状态结束后会瘫痪1秒。

en_description: No longer disables cards and ranged attacks.
cn_description: 不再禁用魔卡和远程攻击。

en_description: For 7s, gain 12% Attack Speed and your shots always trigger Chain Lightning. Cooldown: 18s.
cn_description: 在接下来的7秒内，获得12%的攻击速度并且在射击时必定会附加一道闪电链。冷却时间18秒。

en_description: Cooldown -5s.
cn_description: 冷却时间-5秒。

en_description: Every 1.2s during the effect, apply 2 Mark to 3 random nearby enemies.
cn_description: 技能持续期间每1.2秒给周围的3个随机敌人2层标记。

en_description: Duration +3s.
cn_description: 状态持续时间+3。

en_description: On cast, reduce other skill cooldowns by 3s.
cn_description: 使用时降低其他技能的冷却时间3秒。

en_description: While active, melee attacks always trigger Thunderstrike.
cn_description: 状态持续期间近战攻击会必定附带一道霹雳。

en_description: For 6s after it ends, ranged shots still have a 30% chance to trigger an extra Chain Lightning.
cn_description: 状态结束后的6秒内，远程射击时依然有30%的几率额外附加一道闪电链。

en_description: Melee combos gain +3% Crit Chance. Slam attacks gain an additional +45% Crit Chance.
cn_description: 近战连招提升3%暴击率，你所有的砸再提升45%暴击率。

en_description: Melee combos gain +5% Crit Chance. Slam attacks gain an additional +75% Crit Chance.
cn_description: 近战连招提升5%暴击率，你所有的砸再提升75%暴击率。

en_description: Remove the barrel bash from your combo. Ranged attacks deal +12% damage and +30% Critical Damage.
cn_description: 禁用连招中的炮筒撞击，远程射击提高12%的伤害和30%的暴击伤害。

en_description: Remove the barrel bash from your combo. Ranged attacks deal +18% damage and +50% Critical Damage.
cn_description: 禁用连招中的炮筒撞击，远程射击提高18%的伤害和50%的暴击伤害。

en_description: After combo hit 2, add a 3-hit punch flurry. Each hit deals 24 damage.
cn_description: 在第2段连招后加入一套连续拳，造成24点伤害3次。

en_description: After combo hit 2, add a 3-hit punch flurry. Each hit deals 38 damage.
cn_description: 在第2段连招后加入一套连续拳，造成38点伤害3次。

en_description: After combo hit 2, add 2 heavy slams. They deal 38/46 damage respectively.
cn_description: 在第2段连招后加入2段重砸，分别造成38/46点伤害。

en_description: After combo hit 2, add 3 heavy slams. Each slam deals 38/46/54 damage.
cn_description: 在第2段连招后加入3段重砸，分别造成38/46/54点伤害。

en_description: Barrel hits during melee combos instantly reload. Cooldown: 4s.
cn_description: 近战连招中的撞击命中敌人时，可以快速换弹。冷却时间4秒。

en_description: Barrel hits during melee combos instantly reload. Cooldown: 2.4s.
cn_description: 近战连招中的撞击命中敌人时，可以快速换弹。冷却时间2.4秒。

en_description: Close-range shots become a shotgun blast. Consume all ammo to fire 6 pellets forward. Each pellet pierces enemies and deals 10 damage. Each ammo consumed fires 2 additional pellets. Cooldown: 5s.
cn_description: 近距离射击改为散弹喷射。消耗全部弹药，向前喷出6发散弹。每发散弹可以穿透敌人，造成10点伤害。每消耗1发炮弹额外喷出2发散弹。冷却时间5秒。

en_description: Close-range shots become a shotgun blast. Consume all ammo to fire 6 pellets forward. Each pellet pierces enemies and deals 15 damage. Each ammo consumed fires 2 additional pellets. Cooldown: 2.5s.
cn_description: 近距离射击改为散弹喷射。消耗全部弹药，向前喷出6发散弹。每发散弹可以穿透敌人，造成15点伤害。每消耗1发炮弹额外喷出2发散弹。冷却时间2.5秒。

en_description: Combo sweeps have a 40% chance to trigger an explosive blast at your position.
cn_description: 连招中的横扫有40%几率替换为原地引发一次榴弹爆炸。
groups: 爆炸 | 改小黄第三段

en_description: Combo sweeps have a 72% chance to trigger an explosive blast at your position.
cn_description: 连招中的横扫有72%几率替换为原地引发一次榴弹爆炸。
groups: 爆炸 | 改小黄第三段

en_description: Every 3s, your next dash leaps forward and detonates on landing.
cn_description: 每隔3秒，下次冲刺时向前跳跃，在落点处引发一次等同于榴弹的爆炸。

en_description: Every 1.25s, your next dash leaps forward and detonates on landing.
cn_description: 每隔1.25秒，下次冲刺时向前跳跃，在落点处引发一次等同于榴弹的爆炸。

en_description: At the end of your combo, throw a firebomb that deals 20 damage and leaves burning ground for 1.25s.
cn_description: 在连招最后追加投掷燃烧瓶。造成20点伤害后在地面上留下持续1.25秒的火焰，持续点燃敌人。

en_description: At the end of your combo, throw a firebomb that deals 35 damage and leaves burning ground for 2.5s.
cn_description: 在连招最后追加投掷燃烧瓶。造成35点伤害，在地面上留下持续2.5秒的火焰，持续点燃敌人。

en_description: After combo hit 3, roll backward and place a trap at your position.
cn_description: 在第3段连招后衔接一个向后翻滚，并在原地留下1个陷阱。

en_description: After combo hit 3, roll backward and place 2 traps at your position.
cn_description: 在第3段连招后衔接一个向后翻滚，并在原地留下2个陷阱。

en_description: Your first combo hit becomes a hammer strike dealing 20 damage and forging. Calls down 1 lightning strike.
cn_description: 第一段连招改为铁锤打击，造成20点伤害并锻造。还会引发一道霹雳攻击敌人。

en_description: Your first combo hit becomes a hammer strike dealing 28 damage and forging. Calls down 2 lightning strikes.
cn_description: 第一段连招改为铁锤打击，造成28点伤害并锻造。还会引发两道霹雳攻击敌人。

en_description: Barrel hits always release a lightning chain.
cn_description: 你连招中的撞击附带一道闪电链。

en_description: Your combo slam releases a chain lightning, with a 55% chance to trigger another chain lightning.
cn_description: 你连招中的撞击附带一道闪电链，有55%几率再触发一道闪电链。

en_description: On reload, load 2 burst rounds.
cn_description: 装填时，装填2枚连发弹。

en_description: On reload, load 3 burst rounds.

en_description: Sweep damage +28% and a 50% chance to apply Cripple for 2.5s.
cn_description: 横扫的伤害提高28%，并且有50%几率附加持续2.5秒的残废。

en_description: Sweep damage +35% and applies Cripple for 4s.
cn_description: 横扫的伤害提高35%，并且附加持续4秒的残废。

en_description: Grenade radius +25% and damage +24%.
cn_description: 你的榴弹的攻击范围+25%，可造成的伤害提高24%

en_description: Grenade radius +45% and damage +36%.
cn_description: 你的榴弹的攻击范围+45%，可造成的伤害提高36%

en_description: Explosion Crit Chance +12%.
cn_description: 你所有技能和攻击造成的爆炸的暴击率提高12%

en_description: Explosion Crit Chance +19%.
cn_description: 你所有技能和攻击造成的爆炸的暴击率提高19%

en_description: Burst rounds become 4-shot bursts and gain +4 base damage.
cn_description: 你的连发弹变成4连发，并且获得额外4点基础伤害。

en_description: Burst rounds become 5-shot bursts and gain +6 base damage.
cn_description: 你的连发弹变成5连发，并且获得额外6点基础伤害。

en_description: Burst rounds have a 45% chance to bounce once.
cn_description: 你的连发弹有45%几率弹射一次

en_description: Burst rounds have a 75% chance to bounce once.
cn_description: 你的连发弹有75%几率弹射一次

en_description: Consecutive burst hits on the same enemy gain +3 damage per hit, up to 5 stacks.
cn_description: 你的连发弹连续命中同一个敌人时每次加3点伤害,最多叠加5次

en_description: Consecutive burst hits on the same enemy gain +4 damage per hit, up to 20 stacks.
cn_description: 你的连发弹连续命中同一个敌人时每次加4点伤害,最多叠加20次

en_description: At 12s into combat, 3 random turrets drop from above.
cn_description: 战斗到第12秒时天上掉下来3个随机炮台

en_description: At 12s into combat, 5 random turrets drop from above.
cn_description: 战斗到第12秒时天上掉下来5个随机炮台

en_description: After dealing melee damage, take 30% less damage for 3s.
cn_description: 近战攻击对敌人造成伤害后，3秒内受到的伤害降低30%

en_description: After dealing melee damage, take 45% less damage for 3s.
cn_description: 近战攻击对敌人造成伤害后，3秒内受到的伤害降低45%

en_description: Melee hits grant +8% fire rate for 12s. Stacks up to 5 times.
cn_description: 近战攻击造成伤害时，获得8%射击速度提升，状态持续12秒，最多可以叠加5层。

en_description: Melee hits grant +10% fire rate for 12s. Stacks up to 7 times.
cn_description: 近战攻击造成伤害时，获得10%射击速度提升，状态持续12秒，最多可以叠加7层。

en_description: Shell damage splashes to nearby enemies for 45% of damage.
cn_description: 炮弹造成伤害时，周围的敌人受到等同于伤害45%的溅射伤害。

en_description: Shell damage splashes to nearby enemies for 65% of damage.
cn_description: 炮弹造成伤害时，周围的敌人受到等同于伤害65%的溅射伤害。

en_description:
Perform a 4-hit melee combo in front of you, dealing 18/18/20/45 damage. 
☆
Hit 1: Sweep (18). Hit 2: Sweep (18). Hit 3: Shield Bash (20). Hit 4: Thrust (45).
cn_description:
对前方进行四段近战打击，
造成18/18/20/45点伤害。
☆
对前方进行四段近战打击，
1 - 横扫，造成18点伤害。
2 - 横扫，造成18点伤害。
3 - 盾击，造成20点伤害。
4 - 戳刺，造成45点伤害。

en_description: Shield Bash deals 20 damage, then raise your shield. Hold to keep blocking all frontal damage. A brief window at the start enables a Perfect Parry, reflecting 60 damage to the attacker.
cn_description:
盾击造成20点伤害
然后格挡。完美弹反造成60点伤害。
☆
向前推出盾牌，击中敌人可以造成20点伤害。
长按可以保持举盾。举盾期间格挡来自正面的一切伤害。
刚才开始格挡的一小段时间可以触发完美格挡反击。
对你造成伤害的敌人反弹60点伤害。

en_description: Charge forward with your shield. Hitting an enemy deals 20 damage. Cannot pass through enemies.
cn_description: 向前顶盾冲刺，如果撞到敌人造成20点伤害。无法穿透敌人。

en_description: Dash to the target location, then sweep all nearby enemies for 140 damage and apply Frostbite for 6s. Cooldown: 12s.
cn_description: 向目标位置突进，然后横扫周围的所有敌人，造成140点伤害并使命中的敌人获得持续6秒的冻伤。冷却时间12秒。

en_description: Sweep area +40%, base Attack Damage +30.
cn_description: 横扫的范围+40%，基础攻击力+30。

en_description: Charge limit +1.
cn_description: 技能储存次数+1。

en_description: Now also knocks enemies back.
cn_description: 技能附加击退效果。

en_description: Frostbite duration +4s.
cn_description: 技能附加的冻伤持续时间+4。

en_description: Deal 200% damage to enemies already affected by Frostbite.
cn_description: 对已经冻伤的敌人造成200%伤害。

en_description: Cooldown reduced by 3s.
cn_description: 冷却时间减少3秒。

en_description: Throw a spear. Direct hit deals 135 damage and Freezes the target for 2s. Nearby enemies take 50% damage. Stores 2 charges. Cooldown: 9s.
cn_description: 投掷长矛，对直接命中的目标造成135点伤害并将之冰封2秒，附近的敌人也会受到50%伤害。技能可以储存2次。冷却时间9秒。

en_description: Damage to nearby enemies increased to 95%.
cn_description: 对周围敌人的伤害提高到95%。

en_description: Freeze duration on the main target +3s.
cn_description: 主目标的冰封时间加长3秒。

en_description: Direct damage to Frozen enemies +240%.
cn_description: 对冰封的敌人造成的直接伤害+240%。

en_description: 50% chance to create an Ice Pillar at the hit location.
cn_description: 有50%几率在命中敌人的位置创造一个冰晶柱。

en_description: Cooldown -1.5s, charge limit +1.
cn_description: 冷却时间-1.5，技能储存次数+1。

en_description: On hit, cast a Frost Ring centered on the directly hit target.
cn_description: 命中时以直接命中的单位为中心释放一个冰霜之环。

en_description: Step back to charge, then rush forward with your shield. Deal 75 damage to the first enemy hit and nearby units, knocking them back. Cooldown: 8s.
cn_description: 后撤蓄力，然后向前顶盾猛冲，对第一个命中的敌人和他周围的单位造成75点伤害并将他们撞飞，冷却时间8秒。

en_description: Restore 20 Frost on impact.
cn_description: 撞击时恢复20点霜寒值。

en_description: Knockback distance +80%, skill damage +30.
cn_description: 把敌人撞飞的距离提高80%，技能伤害+30。

en_description: Gain +1 damage per 1 Frost at the moment of impact.
cn_description: 撞击时每有1点霜寒值增加1点伤害。

en_description: Cooldown -2s.
cn_description: 冷却时间-2。

en_description: Leaves a Frost Path behind after charging.
cn_description: 猛冲后会留下一道冰霜路径。

en_description: No longer stops when hitting an enemy.
cn_description: 命中敌人时不会停下。

en_description: Spin your spear, dealing 120 damage per second to nearby enemies for 2.4s. Move at 70% speed while active. Cooldown: 16s.
cn_description:
旋舞长枪，对周围敌人每秒造成120点伤害，持续2.4秒。
期间以70%的速度移动。冷却时间16秒。

en_description: You can move at normal speed while using the skill.
cn_description: 使用技能期间可以以正常速度移动。

en_description: Damage per second +30.
cn_description: 每秒伤害+30。

en_description: Gain 8 Shield while using the skill.
cn_description: 使用技能期间获得8点护盾。

en_description: After hitting enemies for over 1.5s, apply a 0.9s Freeze.
cn_description: 连续攻击敌人超过1.5秒后会施加持续0.9秒的冰封。

en_description: Duration +1.4s.
cn_description: 持续时间+1.4秒。

en_description: Ends with a massive spinning slash, dealing 135 AoE damage.
cn_description: 技能以一个巨大的回旋斩收尾，回旋斩造成135点范围伤害。

en_description: Throw your shield. It bounces between enemies, dealing 70 damage and stunning for 1.5 seconds to up to 3 enemies before returning to your hand. Cooldown: 6.5s.
cn_description: 投掷盾牌，盾牌会在敌人中弹射，对最多3个敌人造成70点伤害和1.5秒眩晕后返回手中。冷却时间6.5秒。

en_description: Applies Frostbite for 6s.
cn_description: 技能附加持续6秒的冻伤。

en_description: Cooldown -1.5s.
cn_description: 冷却时间-1.5秒。

en_description: Damage +25.
cn_description: 技能伤害+25。

en_description: Catching the shield casts a Frost Ring.
cn_description: 接住盾牌时会施放一次冰霜之环。

en_description: Stun duration increased by 2.5 seconds.
cn_description: 眩晕时间延长2.5秒。

en_description: Now pierces all enemies, dealing 75% damage, and can hit again on the return pass.
cn_description: 技能改为可以穿透所有敌人并对他们造成75%的技能伤害，并可以在返回时再造成一次伤害。

en_description: Channel an ice dragon to call down hail over an area. 25 shards per second , each shard deals 38 damage and Slows enemies by 60%. Max duration 2.4s. Cooldown: 18s.
cn_description: 持续引导一头冰龙对在一片区域降下冰雹，每秒25片。每片冰雹落下时可以造成38伤害并降低敌人60%的移动速度。冰风暴最多持续2.4秒。冷却时间18秒。

en_description: Duration +1.6s.
cn_description: 持续时间+1.6秒。

en_description: Hail damage +10.
cn_description: 冰雹伤害+10。

en_description: Cooldown -6.5s.
cn_description: 冷却时间-6.5秒。

en_description: Hits have a 20% chance to Freeze enemies for 1s.
cn_description: 冰风暴命中敌人时有20%的几率使敌人冰封1秒。

en_description: Automatically raises your shield while channeling.
cn_description: 技能施法期间自动举盾。

en_description: If the blizzard kills an enemy, create an Ice Pillar.
cn_description: 如果暴风雪击杀敌人，生成一个冰晶柱，

en_description: Summon an ice dragon to tear airborne enemies, dealing 50 damage 4 times and keeping them airborne for +1.3s. Cooldown: 12.5s.
cn_description: 召唤冰龙撕碎浮空的敌人，造成50伤害，重复4次。并使敌人在空中多停留1.3秒。冷却时间12.5秒。

en_description: Attack Damage +30.
cn_description: 攻击力+30。

en_description: Hits apply Cripple for 5s.
cn_description: 伤害时附加持续5秒的残废。

en_description: Hit count +2.
cn_description: 连击次数+2。

en_description: On kill, cooldown becomes 0.5s.
cn_description: 杀死敌人时冷却时间降低到0.5秒。

en_description: After the dragon strikes, it breathes frost at the ground, dealing 35 damage and leaving a Frost Path for 6s.
cn_description: 龙攻击后会向地面吐一发冰霜吐息，造成35点伤害和持续6秒的冰霜路径。

en_description: (Passive) This skill casts automatically, but deals 20% less damage.
cn_description: （被动）技能将自动施放，伤害降低20%。

en_description: Charge up to 1.5s to release a Frost Ring. Deal 45-185 damage to nearby enemies based on charge time. The ring's radius also increases with charge. Cooldown: 8s.
cn_description: 为释放一个冰霜之环蓄力最多1.5秒。随蓄力时间对周围的所有敌人造成45到185点伤害。冰霜之环的影响范围会随蓄力时间而变大。冷却时间8秒。

en_description: Cooldown -2s.
cn_description: 冷却时间-2秒

en_description: After casting, leave a Frost Path beneath you.
cn_description: 施放技能后脚下会留下一片冰霜路径。

en_description: This Frost Ring always Freezes enemies for 1.5s.
cn_description: 此技能创造的冰霜之环必定会冻结敌人1.5秒。

en_description: At full charge, max damage +100.
cn_description: 蓄满时，最大伤害提高100点。

en_description: Charge speed +50%, base damage +70.
cn_description: 蓄力速度+50%，基础伤害+70。

en_description: No longer charge. For 4s, your next block releases a fully charged Glacial Burst.
cn_description: 使用技能后不再蓄力，下次格挡时释放最大蓄力的冰霜之环，状态持续4秒。

en_description: Lunge forward with your spear, lift an enemy for 20 damage, then slam them down, dealing 125 damage in an area at the impact point. Cooldown: 14s.
cn_description: 举枪前冲，挑起一名敌人并对其造成20点伤害，再将其砸向地面，对落点附近的所有敌人造成125点伤害。冷却时间14秒。

en_description: Also deal bonus damage equal to 35% of the lifted enemy's max HP (4% vs bosses).
cn_description: 额外造成被挑起的敌人最大生命值35%的伤害（BOSS则为4%）。

en_description: Cooldown -4s.
cn_description: 冷却时间-4。

en_description: After the slam, create a Dragon Banner at the impact point for 10s.
cn_description: 砸地后在落点处生成一个龙族战旗，持续10秒。

en_description: After the slam, create 1 Ice Pillar at the impact point.
cn_description: 砸地后在落点处生成1个冰晶柱。

en_description: Gain 12 Shield for 4s after casting.
cn_description: 使用技能时获得12点护盾,持续4秒。

en_description: Impact area +80%.
cn_description: 伤害范围扩大80%。

en_description: An ice dragon lifts you skyward. After 2s, crash down and strike a small area for 150 damage. Cooldown: 17s.
cn_description: 召唤冰龙将自己带上天空，2秒后从天而降重击地面，对小范围的敌人造成150点伤害，冷却时间17秒。

en_description: On landing, knock up all enemies in the area.
cn_description: 落地时可以击飞范围内所有敌人。

en_description: Damage +56.
cn_description: 基础伤害+56。

en_description: Gain 8 Shield for 4s on landing.
cn_description: 落地时获得8点护盾，持续4秒。

en_description: While airborne, the dragon spits 7 frost breaths, each dealing 25 damage and leaving a 2s Frost Path.
cn_description: 冰龙在空中时吐下7发冰霜吐息，每发造成25点伤害，并留下持续2秒的冰霜路径。

en_description: Cooldown -5s.
cn_description: 冷却时间-5秒。

en_description: Create 2 Ice Pillars on impact.
cn_description: 落下时创造2个冰晶柱。

en_description: Raise an ice wall made of 3 Ice Pillars in front of you. Building the wall knocks enemies up and deals 60 damage. Cooldown: 10s.
cn_description: 在前方升起一个由3个冰晶柱组成的冰墙。造墙时把敌人顶飞并造成60点伤害。冷却时间10秒。

en_description: Damage +80.
cn_description: 基础伤害+80。

en_description: Charge limit +1.
cn_description: 存储次数+1。

en_description: Knock-up also applies Frostbite for 6s.
cn_description: 顶起敌人时附加持续6秒的冻伤。

en_description: Cooldown -5s.
cn_description: 冷却时间-5。

en_description: After casting, restore 30 Frost over 2s.
cn_description: 施放技能后，在2秒内回复30霜寒值。

en_description: Ice Pillar count +2.
cn_description: 冰晶柱数量+2。

en_description: Summon an ice dragon to breathe frost in a straight line. Deal 80 damage to all enemies hit and leave a Frost Path for 8s. Cooldown: 18s.
cn_description: 召唤冰龙从空中沿着一条线喷吐冰霜气息。对途经的所有敌人造成80点伤害，并留下持续8秒的冰霜路径。冷却时间18秒。

en_description: Damage +40.
Cooldown -2s, stores 2 charges.
cn_description: 冷却时间-2秒，技能可以储存2次。

en_description: Hits apply Frostbite for 6s.
cn_description: 技能造成伤害时附加持续6秒的冻伤。

en_description: If you are hit by the dragon's breath, reduce all skill cooldowns by 3s.
cn_description: 你被冰龙的喷吐命中时，所有技能冷却时间减少3秒。

en_description: Frost Path duration +70%.
cn_description: 此技能生成的冰霜路径持续时间+70%。

en_description: Hits also apply Freeze for 1.5s.
cn_description: 技能造成伤害时附加持续1.5秒的冰封。

en_description: Freeze yourself for 2s. If you are hit during this time, the Freeze ends early and releases a Frost Ring that deals 65 damage to nearby enemies. Cooldown: 11s.
cn_description: 将自己冰封，持续2秒。持续期间如果受到敌人的攻击。会释放一个冰霜之环对周围的敌人造成65点伤害。冷却时间11秒。

en_description: Restore 15 Frost per second while active.
cn_description: 技能持续期间每秒回复15点霜寒值。

en_description: Create an icy ground zone at your original position for 5s.
cn_description: 施放技能时，在原地下生成一片持续5秒的冰霜路径。

en_description: If hit while Frozen, gain 12 Shield for 4.5s when it ends.
cn_description: 若在冰封状态期间受到过攻击，冰封结束时获得12点护盾，持续4.5秒。

en_description: Cooldown -2.5s.
cn_description: 冷却时间-2.5秒。

en_description: While active, release a Frost Ring every 0.5s.
cn_description: 技能持续期间，每0.5秒都会释放一个冰霜之环。

en_description: No longer Freeze yourself. Instead, cast a Frozen decoy, then quickly backstep.
cn_description: 不再冰封自己，改为施放一个冰封的替身，之后进行一个快速后撤。

en_description: Enchant your shield for 3s. On your next Perfect Parry, unleash icy power for 100 bonus damage in front of you and knock enemies up, leaving an Ice Path for 8s. Cooldown: 6.5s.
cn_description: 使盾牌获得持续3秒的附魔，在你的下一次完美格挡时，释放寒冰之力对面前的敌人造成100点额外伤害并击飞，并在身前留下持续8秒的寒冰路径。冷却时间6.5秒。

en_description: Bonus damage +40.
cn_description: 反击的额外伤害+40。

en_description: Bonus damage +10 and stuns enemies for 2s.
cn_description: 反击的额外伤害+10，并将敌人击晕2秒。

en_description: Restore 12 Frost per second while the enchant is active.
cn_description: 持续施加时间内每秒回复12点霜寒值。

en_description: Gain 8 Shield for 2s on cast.
cn_description: 使用技能时获得8点护盾，持续2秒。

en_description: Cooldown -1s, and normal blocks can also trigger it.
cn_description: 技能冷却时间-1秒,并且普通格挡也可以触发。

en_description: If the riposte triggers, reduce cooldown by 4s.
cn_description: 如果反击成功，冷却降低4秒。

en_description: Consume all remaining Frost to blast a forward cone for 50 damage. Each 1 Frost consumed adds +6 damage. Cooldown: 10.5s.
cn_description: 消耗剩余的全部霜寒值，对前方锥形区域造成50点伤害，每消耗1点霜寒值额外提高6点伤害。冷却时间10.5秒。

en_description: Cone angle increased.
cn_description: 锥形区域的角度增大。

en_description: Cooldown -1.5s.
cn_description: 冷却时间-1.5秒。

en_description: Each 1 Frost consumed adds an additional +2 damage.
cn_description: 每消耗1点霜寒值额外提高2点技能伤害。

en_description: Applies Frostbite for 6s.
cn_description: 伤害附加6秒的冻伤。

en_description: Base damage +25 and now launches enemies with heavy knock-up.
cn_description: 基础伤害+25，技能附带大幅度的击飞。

en_description: After casting, restore 20 Frost within 1s.
cn_description: 使用技能后在1秒内内回复20点霜寒值。

en_description: Thrust forward for 75 damage. Every third cast becomes a triple thrust, dealing 3 hits of 45 damage. Cooldown: 3.5s.
cn_description: 向前猛刺，造成75点伤害。每当你第三次使用此技能时，技能变为三连戳刺。造成3段45伤害。冷却时间3.5秒。

en_description: Stores 3 charges.
cn_description: 技能现在可以储存3次。

en_description: Cooldown -1s.
cn_description: 冷却时间-1秒。

en_description: Base damage +15. Triple-thrust damage +8 per hit.
cn_description: 基础伤害+15，三连戳刺伤害+8。

en_description: 30% chance to apply a 1.8s Freeze on hit.
cn_description: 命中时有30%几率赋予敌人持续1.8秒的冰封。

en_description: Now pierces all enemies.
cn_description: 技能现在可以穿透所有敌人。

en_description: Every third cast becomes 7 hits instead.
cn_description: 第三次使用时变为7段伤害。

en_description: Dash in one direction for 4.5s, freely steering toward your cursor. Colliding with enemies deals 65 damage and leaves a 6s Frost Path behind you. Cooldown: 22s.

en_description: Collision damage applies Frostbite for 6s.
cn_description: 撞击伤害附加冻伤6秒。

en_description: Collision damage +30.

en_description: Hitting a wall instantly turns you around and releases a Frost Ring.
cn_description: 如果撞到墙上会立刻反方向转向，并释放一次冰环。

en_description: Frost Path duration +4s.
cn_description: 寒冰路径持续时间延长4秒。

en_description: Cooldown -60%, but dash duration reduced to 1.5s.

cn_description: 激活体内的冰龙血脉，在接下来的7秒内，攻击时获得8%的额外暴击率，并且在攻击时有35%几率冰封敌人0.8秒。冷却时间22秒。

en_description: Freeze chance +15%.
cn_description: 攻击时冻结敌人的几率+15%。

en_description: Critical hits reduce cooldowns by 0.35s.
cn_description: 你的攻击暴击时降低冷却冷却时间0.35秒。

en_description: Crit Chance bonus increases as your HP drops, up to +16% extra.
cn_description: 技能提升的暴击率随你的生命值降低而变得更高。最多额外获得16%。

cn_description: 冷却时间-3.5秒，使用后直接获得1层风怒。

en_description: (Passive) Attacks have a 12% chance to summon a smaller vortex that deals 50% of this skill's damage.
cn_description: （被动）攻击时有12%几率召唤一个较小的旋风，造成此技能50%的伤害。

en_description: Summon vines that surge from both sides toward the center, dealing 60 damage to all enemies hit and applying Entangle. Cooldown: 15s.
cn_description: 召唤藤蔓从两侧向中心蔓延，对经过的所有敌人造成60点伤害，并附加缠绕效果，冷却时间15秒。

en_description: Damage +40.
cn_description: 伤害提高40点。

en_description: Stores 2 charges and base cooldown -1s.
cn_description: 技能现在可以储存2次，基础冷却时间-1秒。

en_description: Enemies at the center take damage twice.
cn_description: 位于技能中心的敌人会受到2次伤害。

en_description: Entangle now Stuns instead of immobilizing.
cn_description: 此技能造成的缠绕可以使敌人眩晕而非无法行动。

en_description: Entangle duration +2.25s.
cn_description: 此技能造成的缠绕持续时间+2.25秒。

en_description: (Passive) For each enemy Entangled, reduce this skill's cooldown by 0.5s.
cn_description: （被动）场上每有一个敌人被缠绕，技能冷却时间-0.5秒。

en_description: Fire a wind bolt. It explodes on the first enemy hit, dealing 110 damage and applying Mark, and deals 55 damage to nearby enemies. Cooldown: 6.5s.
cn_description: 向目标方向发射一道风弹，风弹命中首个敌人时爆炸，造成110点伤害并附加狩猎印记，对周围所有敌人造成55点伤害。冷却时间6.5秒。

en_description: Damage to the first target +35.
cn_description: 对首个命中的敌人伤害+35。

en_description: Cooldown -2.5s.
cn_description: 冷却时间-2.5秒。

en_description: AoE damage +10 and now knocks up all enemies hit.
cn_description: 范围伤害+10，现在可以击飞所有敌人。

en_description: Hitting an enemy restores 20 Summon.
cn_description: 风弹命中敌人时获得20点召唤值。

en_description: Deal 225% damage to Marked enemies.
cn_description: 对带有标记的敌人可以造成225%伤害。

en_description: On hit, all companions gain 35% Attack Speed for 2.5s.
cn_description: 命中时所有宠物获得35%攻速，持续2.5秒。

en_description: Summon an owl at the target location and create a moonlit zone for 3s. Companions inside gain 45% Attack Damage. Cooldown: 12s. Stores 3 charges.
cn_description: 在目标位置召唤一只猫头鹰，并展开一片持续3秒的月光领域。领域内所有的动物伙伴攻击力提升45%。冷却时间12秒。可以储存3次。

en_description: Companion Attack Damage bonus +30%.
cn_description: 动物伙伴的攻击力提升+30%.

en_description: On cast, deal 45 direct damage at the zone center and apply Armor Break for 3s.
cn_description: 施放时对月光的中心造成45点直接伤害和持续3秒的破甲。

en_description: Owl duration +75%.
cn_description: 此技能召唤的猫头鹰持续时间+75%。

en_description: Moonlight duration +2.5s.
cn_description: 月光持续时间+2.5。

en_description: Cooldown -4s.
cn_description: 冷却时间-4。

en_description: Restore 7 Summon per second while standing in moonlight.
cn_description: 你在月光下每秒回复7点召唤值。

en_description: Leap to the target location and rake enemies with wolf claws 5 times. Each hit deals 50 damage and briefly Stuns. Cooldown: 17s.
cn_description: 扑向目标位置，用狼爪连续爪击敌人5次，每次造成50点伤害和短暂的眩晕。冷却时间17秒。

en_description: Cooldown -8s.
cn_description: 冷却时间-8秒。

en_description: Claw damage +10.
cn_description: 爪击伤害+10。

en_description: Deal 180% damage to Marked enemies.
cn_description: 对带有标记的敌人造成180%伤害。

en_description: On cast, all wolf pups gain 35% Attack Speed for 5s.
cn_description: 施放技能时所有幼狼获得35%攻击速度提升，持续5秒。

en_description: Gain 3 Shield per claw hit for 6s.
cn_description: 每次爪击获得3点护盾值，持续6秒。

en_description: If this skill kills an enemy, reduce its cooldown by 50%.
cn_description: 如果击杀敌人，冷却时间缩减一半。

en_description: Sweep a forward cone for 150 damage with a 50% chance to apply Hypnosis. Cooldown: 11s.
cn_description:
向前方扇形区域横扫，造成150点伤害并且有50%几率赋予敌人迷魂粉效果。
冷却时间11秒。

en_description: Base damage +35.
cn_description: 基础技能伤害+35。

en_description: Hypnosis chance becomes 100%.
cn_description: 赋予敌人迷魂粉效果的几率提升到100%。

en_description: This skill is affected by Windfury.
cn_description: 技能可以受风怒影响。

en_description: Can be charged briefly. Damage and area scale with charge time up to 35%.
cn_description: 技能现在可以短暂的蓄力，伤害和作用范围随蓄力时间而放大最多35%。

en_description: Cooldown -3.5s.
cn_description: 冷却时间-3.5秒。

en_description: If you hit your companions, their lifespan +4s.
cn_description: 技能如果打到你的动物伙伴，它们的存活时间+4秒。

en_description: Carve a fissure in the ground, dealing 40 damage. After 2s, it erupts: enemies on the fissure take 250 damage and are Slowed for 0.8s. Cooldown: 21s.
cn_description: 在地面划出一道裂痕，对敌人造成40点伤害，2秒后释放地震波，在裂痕上的敌人会受到250点伤害并被减速0.8秒。冷却时间21秒。

en_description: Eruption damage +45.
cn_description: 地震波的伤害+45。

en_description: Eruption delay reduced to 1.2s and Critical Chance +3.5%.
cn_description: 地震波的延迟缩短到1.2秒，技能暴击率+3.5%。

en_description: Fissure and eruption length +50%.
cn_description: 裂痕和地震的长度增长50%。

en_description: Stepping on the eruption grants 12 Shield for 5s.
cn_description: 踩地震波上使你获得12点护盾，护盾持续5秒。

en_description: (Passive) Each Earthquake reduces this skill's cooldown by 2s.
cn_description: （被动）每次地震都使此技能冷却时间-2秒。

en_description: Eruption count +1.
cn_description: 地震次数+1。

en_description: Enter a feral state for 5s. Your melee attacks become wolf claws that deal 35 damage. While active, you cannot use Nature's Breath or cards. Cooldown: 28s.
cn_description: 在接下来5秒内获得野性状态，近战攻击变更为可以造成35点伤害的狼爪。状态持续期间无法自然之息和魔卡，冷却时间28秒。

en_description: While feral, gain 16% Move Speed and Attack Speed.
cn_description: 野性状态下你的移速和攻速提升16%。

en_description: Cooldown reduced by 5s.
cn_description: 冷却时间降低5秒。

en_description: Nearby companions gain 25% Attack Speed and Move Speed.
cn_description: 你周围的动物伙伴获得25%的攻速和移速加成。

en_description: Wolf claw damage +10.
cn_description: 狼爪伤害提高10点。

en_description: Each claw hit extends the duration by 0.1s.
cn_description: 狼爪每次造成伤害，会延长技能持续时间0.1秒。

en_description: No longer disables Nature's Breath or cards, and all damage dealt +8%.
cn_description: 不再封印自然之息和魔卡，并且全体伤害能力提升8%。

en_description: After a brief charge, fire an energy bolt at the target location, dealing 70 damage to nearby enemies. Cooldown: 6s. Stores up to 5 charges. Can be fired rapidly in succession.
cn_description: 短暂蓄力后，向目标位置发射能量弹，对附近的敌人造成70点伤害。冷却时间6秒，最多可储存5次。可以快速连续发射。

en_description: Charge limit +3.
cn_description: 技能储存次数+3。

en_description: Base damage +8.
cn_description: 技能基础伤害提高8点。

en_description: Cooldown -1.5s.
cn_description: 冷却时间-1.5秒。

en_description: Deal 60% more damage to Marked enemies.
cn_description: 对被标记的敌人的伤害提高60%。

en_description: Hitting an enemy restores 12 Summon.
cn_description: 命中敌人时可以回复12点召唤值。

en_description: Critical Chance +3%. Hits have a 40% chance to apply Hunter's Mark.
cn_description: 暴击率+3%，命中敌人时有40%几率施加猎人印记。

en_description: Bloom a deadly flower at the target location, dealing 110 damage in an area and applying Hypnosis. Cooldown: 7s. Stores 2 charges.
cn_description: 在目标位置绽放致命花朵，对附近的敌人造成110伤害并附加迷魂粉效果。冷却时间7秒，此技能可储存2次。

en_description: Area +50%, base damage +15.
cn_description: 伤害范围扩大50%。基础伤害+15。

en_description: Cooldown -1.5s, charge limit +1.
cn_description: 冷却时间-1.5，技能储存次数+1。

en_description: Base damage +40, but detonation delay +1s.
cn_description: 基础伤害+40，但是技能作用延迟+1秒。

en_description: Killing an enemy creates 1 seed at its death location.
cn_description: 如果此技能杀敌人则在它死亡的位置生成1枚种子。

en_description: Stepping on the flower restores 15 Summon.
cn_description: 踩在花上回复15点召唤值。

en_description: Critical Chance +20% against sleeping enemies.
cn_description: 对睡梦中的敌人暴击率+20%。

en_description: Summon a giant bear that crashes down on the target location for 120 damage, then fights alongside you. Cooldown: 8.5s. If the bear dies, this skill immediately enters a 24s cooldown.
cn_description: 召唤巨熊，从天而降砸向目标位置，造成120点伤害。然后熊会协助你作战。冷却时间8.5秒。如果熊死亡，则技能立即进入24秒冷却。

en_description: Damage +40.
cn_description: 造成的伤害+40。

en_description: Death penalty cooldown reduced from 24s to 15s.
cn_description: 熊死亡后的额外冷却时间从24秒降低到15秒。

en_description: On landing, triggers 2 earthquakes at the impact point.
cn_description: 在落地位置上引发2次地震。

en_description: After casting, the bear takes 40% less damage for 5s.
cn_description: 使用技能后，熊会获得40%的减伤，持续5秒。

en_description: If no bear is active, this skill deals +150% damage.
cn_description: 当场上没有熊时，此技能伤害+150%。

en_description: Each time the bear takes damage, reduce this skill's cooldown by 1.5s.
cn_description: 熊每次受到伤害，技能冷却时间-1.5秒。

en_description: Summon a giant bear to charge forward, dealing 70 damage and briefly Stunning enemies it passes through. The bear then fights alongside you. Cooldown: 7s. If the bear dies, this skill immediately enters a 24s cooldown.
cn_description: 召唤巨熊，向目标方向冲撞，对经过的敌人造成70点伤害和短暂的眩晕。然后熊会协助你作战。冷却时间7秒。如果熊死亡，则技能立即进入24秒冷却。

en_description: Damage to the first enemy hit +125%.
cn_description: 对撞到的第一个敌人造成的伤害+125%。

en_description: Damage +10 and hits apply Cripple.
cn_description: 技能伤害+10，伤害时附加残废。

en_description: Charge damage +5. Distance and speed +50%, and now knocks up all enemies hit.
cn_description: 冲刺伤害提高5，距离和速度提高50%，现在可以击飞所有的敌人。

en_description: If the bear hits a wall, it releases a shockwave dealing 60 AoE damage.
cn_description: 如果熊撞到墙上，会撞出冲击波，造成60点范围伤害。

en_description: Each enemy hit grants the bear +16% Attack Speed for 6s.
cn_description: 技能每命中一个敌人，熊在接下来的6秒内增加16%攻击速度。

en_description: Stores 2 charges and cooldown -1.5s.
cn_description: 技能现在可以储存2次，冷却时间-1.5秒。

en_description: Summon an owl to build a hurricane, then blast it forward, dealing up to 240 damage and knocking up enemies for 0.9s. Longer charge increases travel distance. Cooldown: 17s.
cn_description: 召唤一个猫头鹰并让它积蓄一道飓风，随后向它的前方吹出，对途经的所有敌人造成最多240点伤害和0.9秒的击飞。积蓄时间越长，飓风的吹出距离越远。冷却时间17秒。

en_description: Cooldown reduced by 5s.
cn_description: 冷却时间降低5秒。

en_description: After casting, the owl has a chance to remain and fight.
cn_description: 猫头鹰在放完技能后会留下战斗。

en_description: Fully charged hurricanes gain +50% Critical Chance.
cn_description: 蓄满的飓风暴击率+50%。

en_description: Base damage +15 and charge speed +100%.
cn_description: 技能基础伤害+15，蓄力速度提升100%。

en_description: The owl releases 3 hurricanes instead of 1.
cn_description: 猫头鹰吹出的飓风从1道变成3道。

en_description: If the hurricane hits you, gain 85% Dodge for 4.5s.
cn_description: 你被飓风吹到时会获得85%的闪避，持续4.5秒。

en_description: Summon an owl to build a hurricane, then blast it forward, dealing up to 240 damage and knocking up enemies for 0.9s. Longer charge increases travel distance. Cooldown: 17s.
cn_description: 召唤一个猫头鹰并让它积蓄一道飓风，随后向它的前方吹出，对途经的所有敌人造成最多240点伤害和0.9秒的击飞。积蓄时间越长，飓风的吹出距离越远。冷却时间17秒。

en_description: Fire an energy bolt into the target area, dealing 200 AoE damage and triggering a special summon. Cooldown: 24s. Costs 50 Summon.
cn_description: 向目标区域发射一枚能量弹，在一定范围内范围造成200点伤害并触发一次特殊的召唤。冷却时间24秒，使用技能需要消耗50点召唤条。

en_description: Damage +45.
cn_description: 技能伤害+45。

en_description: Summoned companion count +50%.
cn_description: 召唤动物伙伴的数量+50%。

en_description: Hits apply Mark.
cn_description: 命中敌人时附加标记。

en_description: Cooldown -9s.
cn_description: 冷却时间-9秒。

en_description: Summoned companions last 40% longer.
cn_description: 技能召唤的动物伙伴持续时间增长40%。

en_description: Summon cost reduced to 15.
cn_description: 召唤条消耗降低到15点。

en_description: For 2.4s, a gentle wind protects you: gain 30% Move Speed and dodge 100% of enemy attacks. Cooldown: 14s.
cn_description: 在接下来的2.4秒内被微风保护，提高30%的移动速度，持续期间100%闪避来自敌人的攻击。冷却时间14秒。

en_description: Cooldown -1.5s, stores 2 charges.
cn_description: 冷却时间-1.5秒，技能可以储存2次。

en_description: Also gain 30% Attack Speed.
cn_description: 现在攻击速度也会提升30%。

en_description: Duration +1.2s.
cn_description: 持续时间提高1.2秒。

en_description: While active, global cooldown rate +50%.
cn_description: 状态持续期间，全体技能冷却速率+50%。

en_description: Move Speed bonus +45% and you can pass through enemies. Passing through deals 40 damage (each enemy can only be hit once every 2s).
cn_description: 移动速度加成额外提高45%，并且能穿过敌人，穿透敌人时造成40点伤害，每个敌人两秒内只能受到一次伤害。

en_description: When Wind skills deal damage, reduce this skill's cooldown by 1s.
cn_description: 风系技能造成伤害时，此技能冷却时间降低1秒。

en_description: Channel for 1.2s to restore 40 Summon. Cooldown: 5s. Can only be used within 3s after killing an enemy.
cn_description: 在1.2秒内持续施法，回复40点召唤值，冷却时间5秒。只有在击杀敌人后3秒内才可以使用。

en_description: While channeling, Nature's Breath cooldown rate +150%.
cn_description: 引导期间自然之息的冷却速率增加150%。

en_description: Gain 5 Shield per second while channeling, lasting 5s.
cn_description: 引导期间持续获得护盾，每秒获得5点，持续5秒。

en_description: Max channel time +50% and Summon restored +50%.
cn_description: 可引导时间增加50%，回复的召唤值也增加50%。

en_description: Cooldown -3s.
cn_description: 冷却时间-3秒。

en_description: Create Grassland beneath you for 4s while channeling.
cn_description: 引导时脚下出现一片草地，持续4秒。

en_description: On completing the channel, 35% chance to summon a wolf pup, hedgehog, or owl immediately.
cn_description: 引导完成后有35%几率直接召唤一个幼狼或刺猬或猫头鹰。

en_description: Before your melee combo, add a quick tap that deals 20 damage and applies Hunt Mark.
cn_description: 在近战连招前附加一段快速的敲击，造成20点伤害并附加狩猎印记。

en_description: Before your melee combo, add a quick tap that deals 40 damage and applies Hunt Mark.
cn_description: 在近战连招前附加一段快速的敲击，造成40点伤害并附加狩猎印记。

en_description: After combo hit 3, slam the ground to deal 40 damage to nearby enemies and create magical grass.
cn_description: 在第3段连招后猛击地面，对周围的敌人造成40点伤害，并生成一片魔法草地。

en_description: After combo hit 3, slam the ground to deal 80 damage to nearby enemies and create magical grass.
cn_description: 在第3段连招后猛击地面，对周围的敌人造成80点伤害，并生成一片魔法草地。

en_description: Every 4s, your next Slam becomes a powered Slam that deals 50 damage and triggers 1 quake at the target location.
cn_description: 每4秒，下次重击将升级为可造成50点伤害的强力重击，并在目标位置造成1次地震。

en_description: Every 4s, your next Slam becomes a powered Slam that deals 75 damage and triggers 2 quakes at the target location.
cn_description: 每4秒，下次重击将升级为可造成75点伤害的强力重击，并在目标位置造成2次地震。

en_description: After a combo Sweep, spend 10 Summon to slam for 20 damage and summon 2 hedgehogs to fire a volley of quills. Each hedgehog attacks 6 times.
cn_description: 在你近战连招的横扫后，消耗10点召唤值，进行一次砸地攻击造成20点伤害，并召唤2只刺猬进行一轮齐射，每只刺猬攻击6次。

en_description: After a combo Sweep, spend 10 Summon to slam for 30 damage and summon 3 hedgehogs to fire a volley. Each hedgehog attacks 6 times.
cn_description: 在你近战连招的横扫后，消耗10点召唤值，进行一次砸地攻击造成30点伤害，并召唤3只刺猬进行一轮齐射，每只刺猬攻击6次。

en_description: After Slam hit 3, add a slower Slam that deals 70 damage.
cn_description: 在第3段重击后追加一记更缓慢的重击，造成70点伤害。

en_description: After Slam hit 3, add a slower Slam that deals 120 damage.
cn_description: 在第3段重击后追加一记更缓慢的重击，造成120点伤害。

en_description: Spend 10 Summon to replace Slam hit 3 with 3 forward energy bolts.
cn_description: 消耗10点召唤条，可以将第3段重击替换向前方发射3个能量弹。

en_description: Spend 5 Summon to replace Slam hit 3 with 3 forward energy bolts.
cn_description: 消耗5点召唤条，可以将第3段重击替换向前方发射3个能量弹。

en_description: After a combo Sweep, spin your staff to deal 15×3 damage to nearby enemies. While spinning, evade enemy attacks (100%).
cn_description: 在你近战连招的横扫后，持续的旋转法杖对周围的敌人造成15*3点伤害，期间100%闪避敌人的攻击。

en_description: After a combo Sweep, spin your staff to deal 24×3 damage to nearby enemies. While spinning, evade enemy attacks (100%).
cn_description: 在你近战连招的横扫后，持续的旋转法杖对周围的敌人造成24*3点伤害，期间100%闪避敌人的攻击。

en_description: Merge your two Sweep hits into one Sweep and set its damage to 30.
cn_description: 将两段横扫攻击合并为一段横扫，并将伤害提高到30。

en_description: Merge your two Sweep hits into one Sweep and set its damage to 50.
cn_description: 将两段横扫攻击合并为一段横扫，并将伤害提高到50。

en_description: While Summon is above 70, each Sweep is replaced by 2 claw hits that deal 30 damage each.
cn_description: 当召唤值大于70时，你的每下横扫攻击将替换为2次可造成30点伤害的爪击。

en_description: While Summon is above 50, each Sweep is replaced by 2 claw hits that deal 30 damage each.
cn_description: 当召唤值大于50时，你的每下横扫攻击将替换为2次可造成30点伤害的爪击。

en_description: Every 6s, Nature's Breath is replaced by a charging wolf that deals 45 damage to all enemies it passes through. Costs 10 Summon.
cn_description: 每隔6秒，自然之息将替换为召唤一个狼前冲，对经过的所有敌人造成45点伤害。需要消耗10点召唤值。

en_description: Every 6s, Nature's Breath is replaced by a charging wolf that deals 70 damage to all enemies it passes through. Costs 10 Summon.
cn_description: 每隔6秒，自然之息将替换为召唤一个狼前冲，对经过的所有敌人造成70点伤害。需要消耗10点召唤值。

en_description: Nature's Breath charges +3 and cooldown -40%, but right-click hits generate 50% less Summon.
cn_description: 自然之息的储存数+3，冷却时间降低40%。但是右键命中敌人能提供的召唤值降低一半。

en_description: Nature's Breath charges +5 and cooldown -50%, but right-click hits generate 50% less Summon.
cn_description: 自然之息的储存数+5，冷却时间降低50%。但是右键命中敌人能提供的召唤值降低一半。

en_description: If Nature's Breath hits no enemies, it bounces back to you and grants 15 Summon.
cn_description: 自然之息若未命中任何敌人，将弹回自身并获得15点召唤值。

en_description: If Nature's Breath hits no enemies, it bounces back to you and grants 25 Summon.
cn_description: 自然之息若未命中任何敌人，将弹回自身并获得25点召唤值。

en_description: Every 6s, your next Nature's Breath that hits the ground charges briefly, then creates a whirlwind that deals 45 damage and knocks enemies up.
cn_description: 每6秒下一次自然之息命中地面后会短暂蓄力，然后引发一次可以造成45点伤害的旋风并将敌人吹起。

en_description: Every 4s, your next Nature's Breath that hits the ground charges briefly, then creates a whirlwind that deals 60 damage and knocks enemies up.
cn_description: 每4秒下一次自然之息命中地面后会短暂蓄力，然后引发一次可以造成60点伤害的旋风并将敌人吹起。

en_description: While an owl is on watch, energy bolts deal +50% damage and gain +12% Crit Chance.
cn_description: 场上有猫头鹰放哨时，能量弹的伤害可以提升50%并获得额外的12%暴击率。

en_description: While an owl is on watch, energy bolts deal +75% damage and gain +18% Crit Chance.
cn_description: 场上有猫头鹰放哨时，能量弹的伤害可以提升75%并获得额外的18%暴击率。

en_description: When firing an energy bolt, you can spend 1 Windfury to split it into 3 small bolts that deal 60% damage and grant 4 Summon.
cn_description: 发射能量弹时可以消耗1层风怒，将能量弹分裂成3个小型能量弹，造成60%伤害并获得4点召唤值。

en_description: When firing an energy bolt, you can spend 1 Windfury to split it into 3 small bolts that deal 90% damage and grant 4 Summon.
cn_description: 发射能量弹时可以消耗1层风怒，将能量弹分裂成3个小型能量弹，造成90%伤害并获得4点召唤值。

en_description: While standing on grass, Nature's Breath fires in a straight line and explodes immediately after dealing 45 bonus damage to the first target hit.
cn_description: 站在草地上时自然之息会改为直线发射，对命中的第一个目标造成45点额外伤害后立即爆炸。

en_description: While standing on grass, Nature's Breath fires in a straight line and explodes immediately after dealing 45 bonus damage to the first target hit. Nature's Breath cooldown -15%.
cn_description: 站在草地上时自然之息会改为直线发射，对命中的第一个目标造成45点额外伤害后立即爆炸。自然之息CD减少15%。

en_description: If an energy bolt hits you, gain a 40% Evasion chance for 8.5s.
cn_description: 能量弹打中自己可以使自己获得40%几率的闪避状态，持续8.5秒。

en_description: If an energy bolt hits you, gain a 65% Evasion chance for 8.5s.
cn_description: 能量弹打中自己可以使自己获得65%几率的闪避状态，持续8.5秒。

en_description: If your energy bolt kills an enemy, fire an extra energy bolt at 3 random nearby targets.
cn_description: 如果你的能量弹击杀了敌人，向周围的3个随机目标再一发能量弹。

en_description: If your energy bolt kills an enemy, fire an extra energy bolt at 4 random nearby targets.
cn_description: 如果你的能量弹击杀了敌人，向周围的4个随机目标再一发能量弹。

en_description: Whenever you summon a wolf pup, you have a 32% chance to summon an extra pup.
cn_description: 每召唤一个幼狼，就有32%几率额外召唤一个幼狼。

en_description: Whenever you summon a wolf pup, you have a 50% chance to summon an extra pup.
cn_description: 每召唤一个幼狼，就有50%几率额外召唤一个幼狼。

en_description: Melee hits have a 9% chance to summon a wolf pup to assist you.
cn_description: 近战攻击时有9%几率召唤一个幼狼协助战斗。

en_description: Melee hits have a 16% chance to summon a wolf pup to assist you.
cn_description: 近战攻击时有16%几率召唤一个幼狼协助战斗。

en_description: Wolf pups have a 17% chance to Stun on hit. Skill-summoned pups also briefly Stun enemies.
cn_description: 幼狼在攻击时有17%的几率将敌人击晕。技能召唤的幼狼也会使敌人短暂眩晕。

en_description: Wolf pups have a 24% chance to Stun on hit. Skill-summoned pups also briefly Stun enemies.
cn_description: 幼狼在攻击时有24%的几率将敌人击晕。技能召唤的幼狼也会使敌人短暂眩晕。

en_description: When a wolf pup hits an enemy, gain +8% Attack Speed for 2.5s, up to 8 stacks.
cn_description: 幼狼每次命中敌人时，你获得8%攻速加成，持续2.5秒，最多8层。

en_description: When a wolf pup hits an enemy, gain +14% Attack Speed for 2.5s, up to 10 stacks.
cn_description: 幼狼每次命中敌人时，你获得14%攻速加成，持续2.5秒，最多10层。

en_description: For each nearby enemy below 50% HP, all wolf pups gain +35% Attack Speed.
cn_description: 周围每有一个血量低于50%的敌人，所有幼狼的攻击速度提升35%。

en_description: For each nearby enemy below 50% HP, all wolf pups gain +50% Attack Speed.
cn_description: 周围每有一个血量低于50%的敌人，所有幼狼的攻击速度提升50%。

en_description: When grass is created, you have a 50% chance to summon a wolf pup.
cn_description: 草地生成时有50%几率召唤一个幼狼协助战斗。

en_description: When grass is created, you have a 80% chance to summon a wolf pup.
cn_description: 草地生成时有80%几率召唤一个幼狼协助战斗。

en_description: Summon a spectral wolf pup that never expires.
cn_description: 召唤一个永远不消失的幽灵幼狼协助战斗。

en_description: Summon a spectral wolf pup that never expires. The spectral pup gains increased damage, Move Speed, and Attack Speed.
cn_description: 召唤一个永远不消失的幽灵幼狼协助战斗，提升幽灵幼狼的攻击力、移速、攻速。

en_description: When your basic summon triggers, you have a 75% chance to summon an extra hedgehog.
cn_description: 基础召唤触发时75%几率额外召唤一只刺猬协助你战斗。

en_description: When your basic summon triggers, always summon an extra hedgehog.
cn_description: 基础召唤触发时额外召唤一只刺猬协助你战斗。

en_description: Sliding has a 14% chance to summon a hedgehog.
cn_description: 滑铲时有14%几率召唤一个刺猬协助战斗。

en_description: Sliding has a 21% chance to summon a hedgehog.
cn_description: 滑铲时有21%几率召唤一个刺猬协助战斗。

en_description: Every 7th right-click throws a hedgehog, which releases a needle burst around it. Each needle hit deals 24 damage.
cn_description: 每第7个右键丢个刺猬，并且会往周围发射1次针刺散射，每次造成24点伤害。

en_description: Every 6th right-click throws a hedgehog, which releases a needle burst around it. Each needle hit deals 24 damage.
cn_description: 每第6个右键丢个刺猬，并且会往周围发射1次针刺散射，每次造成24点伤害。

en_description: When hedgehogs attack, they fire 1–3 extra quills.
cn_description: 刺猬攻击时，额外发射1至3根尖刺。

en_description: When hedgehogs attack, they fire 2–4 extra quills.
cn_description: 刺猬攻击时，额外发射2至4根尖刺。

en_description: When you Slam, all hedgehogs fire quills around them, dealing 24 damage.
cn_description: 重击时，所有的刺猬向周围发射尖刺，造成24点伤害。

en_description: When you Slam, all hedgehogs fire quills around them, dealing 36 damage.
cn_description: 重击时，所有的刺猬向周围发射尖刺，造成36点伤害。

cn_description: 击杀敌人时有40%几率召唤一只猫头鹰协助战斗。

en_description: On kill, you have a 70% chance to summon an owl to assist you.
cn_description: 击杀敌人时有70%几率召唤一只猫头鹰协助战斗。

en_description: When summoning a wolf or hedgehog, you have a 45% chance to summon an owl instead. Owls summoned this way gain +25% Attack Speed.
cn_description: 召唤狼或刺猬时有45%几率转为召唤一只猫头鹰，由此召唤的猫头鹰获得额外25%攻速。

en_description: When summoning a wolf or hedgehog, you have a 55% chance to summon an owl instead. Owls summoned this way gain +45% Attack Speed.
cn_description: 召唤狼或刺猬时有55%几率转为召唤一只猫头鹰，由此召唤的猫头鹰获得额外45%攻速。

cn_description: 果子成熟的时候有50%几率变成一只猫头鹰。

en_description: When a fruit ripens, it has a 80% chance to turn into an owl.
cn_description: 果子成熟的时候有80%几率变成一只猫头鹰。

en_description: Casting a Spell Card summons an owl to assist you. Cooldown: 4s.
cn_description: 施放魔卡时，召唤一只猫头鹰协助战斗。（冷却4秒）。

en_description: Casting a Spell Card summons an owl to assist you, with a 50% chance to summon an extra owl. Cooldown: 4s.
cn_description: 施放魔卡时，召唤一只猫头鹰协助战斗，有50%几率额外再召一只（冷却4秒）。

en_description: Owl wind has a 30% chance to knock enemies up and always Crit.
cn_description: 猫头鹰的风有30%几率可以将敌人击飞并且必定暴击。

en_description: Owl wind has a 45% chance to knock enemies up and always Crit.
cn_description: 猫头鹰的风有45%几率可以将敌人击飞并且必定暴击。

en_description: When you gain Windfury, all owls gain +250% Attack Speed for 3.5s.
cn_description: 你获得风怒时，所有猫头鹰也会获得250%攻速，持续3.5秒。

en_description: When you gain Windfury, all owls gain +300% Attack Speed for 5s.
cn_description: 你获得风怒时，所有猫头鹰也会获得300%攻速，持续5秒。

en_description: On your first summon after entering a room, also summon a giant bear. Then, summon the bear again after every 3 summons.
cn_description: 进入房间后的第一次召唤时额外召唤巨熊协助战斗。每进行3次召唤再次召唤巨熊。

cn_description: 进入房间后的第一次召唤时额外召唤巨熊协助战斗。每进行2次召唤再次召唤巨熊。

cn_description: 当你受到攻击时，召唤一只巨熊协助战斗。

cn_description: 当你受到攻击时，召唤一只巨熊协助战斗，并为你和熊提供一个持续3秒的25%减伤。

cn_description: 每隔5秒，熊的下一次攻击可以使敌人缠绕。

cn_description: 每隔3.5秒，熊的下一次攻击可以使敌人缠绕。

en_description: When you or your bear take damage, fire quills around you, dealing 24 damage.
cn_description: 你和你的熊受到攻击时会向周围发射针刺，造成24点伤害。

en_description: When you or your bear take damage, fire quills around you, dealing 36 damage.
cn_description: 你和你的熊受到攻击时会向周围发射针刺，造成36点伤害。

en_description: Wolf and claw damage +12% and Crit Chance +4%. Crits also apply Armor Break.
cn_description: 狼和爪击的攻击力提高12%，暴击率提高4%，并且暴击时会使敌人破防。

en_description: Wolf and claw damage +20% and Crit Chance +6%. Crits also apply Armor Break.
cn_description: 狼和爪击的攻击力提高20%，暴击率提高6%，并且暴击时会使敌人破防。

en_description: Enemies knocked up by wind take 50 damage when they land.
cn_description: 被风吹起的敌人落地时受到50点伤害。

en_description: Enemies knocked up by wind take 90 damage when they land.
cn_description: 被风吹起的敌人落地时受到90点伤害。

en_description: When hedgehog quills hit, they have an 18% chance to apply a debuff that makes the target take +15% subsequent quill damage. Stacks up to 10. Needle Burst always adds 1 stack.
cn_description:
刺猬的尖刺攻击命中敌人时，有18%几率令其受到的后续刺伤害提高15%，可叠加至10层。
尖刺喷射命中敌人时必定叠加一层该效果。

en_description: When hedgehog quills hit, they have a 30% chance to apply a debuff that makes the target take +18% subsequent quill damage. Stacks up to 12. Needle Burst always adds 1 stack.

尖刺喷射命中敌人时必定叠加一层该效果。

cn_description: 你和猫头鹰施放的烈风可造成的伤害提高12%，并有25%几率使敌人残废。

en_description: Gale damage from you and your owls +20% and has a 35% chance to Cripple.

cn_description: 你的能量弹爆炸时，有12%几率爆炸在位置上引发2次地震。

cn_description: 你的能量弹爆炸时，有20%几率爆炸在位置上引发2次地震。

cn_description: 地震的首次震击会将敌人震晕1.2秒，接下来的每次震击有24%几率震晕敌人。

cn_description: 地震的冲击次数增加1段。

cn_description: 地震时有50%几率召唤一只刺猬协助战斗。

cn_description: 击杀敌人时，在周围生成一片草地（冷却5秒）。

cn_description: 当你站在草地上时缓慢获得护盾，最多可叠加10点。离开草地后护盾效果额外持续1.5秒。

cn_description: 横扫时有15%几率缠绕敌人。

cn_description: 横扫时有23%几率缠绕敌人。

cn_description: 每隔9秒，缠绕周围的所有敌人。

cn_description: 每隔7秒，缠绕周围的所有敌人。

cn_description: 缠绕效果的持续时间延长65%。

cn_description: 每隔6秒，下一次能量弹命中敌人时，会附加狩猎印记。

en_description: Every 4s, your next energy bolt hit applies Hunt Mark.
cn_description: 每隔4秒，下一次能量弹命中敌人时，会附加狩猎印记。

cn_description: 击杀猎人标记的敌人后，所有动物伙伴获得5秒的45%的攻速与15%的移速加成。

cn_description: 击杀猎人标记的敌人后，所有动物伙伴获得5秒的75%的攻速与25%的移速加成。

cn_description: 使用魔卡获得风怒，冷却3秒。

cn_description: 横扫命中时有14%几率获得风怒。

cn_description: 吃下灵果后的7秒内，能量弹会在命中地面后再向前弹跳2次，造成85%的伤害。

cn_description: 小型敌人造成的伤害增加5%，对小型敌人造成的伤害增加35%。

en_description: Bosses deal 15% increased damage, but you deal 5% increased damage to them.
cn_description: BOSS造成的伤害增加15%，你对BOSS的伤害提高5%。

en_description: Bosses deal 5% increased damage, but you deal 15% increased damage to them.
cn_description: BOSS造成的伤害增加5%，你对BOSS的伤害提高15%。

en_description: Active Skill Cooldown Rate is reduced by 20%, but damage is increased by 3%.
cn_description: 主动技能冷却速率降低20%，但是伤害提高3%。

en_description: Active Skill Cooldown Rate is reduced by 3%, but damage is increased by 20%.
cn_description: 主动技能冷却速率降低3%，但是伤害提高20%。

en_description: The longer combat lasts, the lower your damage, up to 18% (9% in Boss rooms).
cn_description: 战斗时间越长，你造成的伤害越低，最多18%（BOSS房9%）。

en_description: The longer combat lasts, the higher your damage, up to 18% (9% in Boss rooms).
cn_description: 战斗时间越长，你造成的伤害越高，最多18%（BOSS房9%）。

en_description: If you have fewer than 120 Gold, lose 3 HP on room entry.
cn_description: 金币少于120时，进入房间时失去3点生命值。

en_description: On room entry, your current Gold increases by 7%.
cn_description: 进入房间时你持有的金币数量提高7%。

en_description: Shop prices increase by 15%. Refreshing the shop costs 5 HP.
cn_description: 商人出售的物品价格提升15%，刷新商店时会失去5点生命值。

en_description: Shop prices decrease by 5%. The first two shop refreshes are free.
cn_description: 商人出售的物品价格降低5%，前两次商店刷新免费。

en_description: When choosing a Card/Ability, lose 15 HP if you do not select the first option.
cn_description: 选择魔卡/能力时如果不选第一个选项，失去15点生命值。

en_description: When choosing a Card/Ability, restore 20 HP if you select the first option.
cn_description: 选择魔卡/能力时如果选择第一个选项，回复20点生命值。

en_description: If you take no action for 2.5s, fall Asleep for 2s.
cn_description: 如果2.5秒没有任何行动，睡着，持续2秒。

en_description: If you take no action for 2.5s, fall Asleep for 1.5s. After waking, gain 35% increased damage for 12s.
cn_description: 如果2.5秒没有任何行动，睡着，持续1.5秒，接下来的12秒内伤害提高35%。

en_description: When your damage would kill an enemy, there is a 30% chance it leaves them alive.
cn_description: 对敌人造成的伤害致死时，有30%几率不会致死。

en_description: When you would take fatal damage, there is an 85% chance to ignore it and become invulnerable for 3s.
cn_description: 你受到致死伤害的时候，有85%几率免疫伤害并无敌3秒。

en_description: The lower your HP, the more damage you take, up to 20%.
cn_description: 你的生命值越低，受到的伤害越高，最多20%。

en_description: The lower your HP, the less damage you take, up to 20%.
cn_description: 你的生命值越低，受到的伤害越低，最多20%。

en_description: On kill, take 2% increased damage and gain 1% increased damage for 10s. Stacks up to 10 times.
cn_description: 每次击杀敌人，受到伤害增加2%，攻击力增加1%。持续10秒，最多叠加10层。

en_description: On kill, take 1% reduced damage and gain 1% increased damage for 10s. Stacks up to 10 times.
cn_description: 每次击杀敌人，受到伤害减少1%，攻击力增加1%。持续10秒，最多叠加10层。

en_description: Crit Chance against large enemies is reduced by 8%.
cn_description: 对大体型的敌人暴击率降低8%。

en_description: Crit Chance against large enemies is increased by 8%.
cn_description: 对大体型的敌人暴击率增加8%。

en_description: If no choice is made within 8s when selecting a Talent/Card, one is chosen at random.
cn_description: 如果在天赋/魔卡的选择时如果8秒内没有做出选择，则随机选择一个。

en_description: If no choice is made within 8s when selecting a Talent/Card, one is chosen at random, with a 35% chance to gain an additional choice.
cn_description: 如果在天赋/魔卡的选择时如果8秒内没有做出选择，则随机选择一个，且有35%几率额外选择一个。

en_description: Lose 1 Equipment Slot.
cn_description: 装备栏位减少1格。

en_description: Gain 1 Equipment Slot.
cn_description: 装备栏位增加1格。

en_description: Stats gained from Equipment are reduced by 50%.
cn_description: 从装备中获得的属性降低50%。

en_description: Stats gained from Equipment are increased by 50%.
cn_description: 从装备中获得的属性提升50%。

en_description: Opening a chest has a 20% chance to replace its reward with a Banana Peel.
cn_description: 开宝箱的时候有20%几率将奖励替换成香蕉皮。

en_description: Opening a chest has a 20% chance to grant an additional reward.
cn_description: 开宝箱时有20%几率获得额外奖励。

en_description: Enemy count increases by 12%.
cn_description: 敌人的数量增加12%。

en_description: Enemy count decreases by 10%.
cn_description: 敌人的数量减少10%。

en_description: Support Skill Cooldown is increased by 65%.
cn_description: 支援技能的冷却时间增加65%。

en_description: Support Skill Cooldown is reduced by 25%.
cn_description: 支援技能的冷却时间减少25%。

en_description: Backstab Damage is reduced by 30%.
cn_description: 背刺伤害降低30%。

en_description: Backstab Damage is reduced by 8%. Damage dealt from the front is increased by 16%.
cn_description: 背刺伤害降低8%。对敌人的正面伤害增加16%。

en_description: Each time you eat Cake, lose 2% Move Speed and 1% Attack Speed.
cn_description: 每次吃蛋糕时，降低2%的移速和1%的攻速。

en_description: Each time you eat Cake, gain 1.5% Damage and +20 Max HP.
cn_description: 每次吃蛋糕时，增加1.5%攻击力，并获得额外20点生命上限。

en_description: Damage dealt to distant enemies is reduced, up to 15%.
cn_description: 对远处的敌人造成的伤害降低，最多15%。

en_description: Damage dealt to distant enemies is increased, up to 15%.
cn_description: 对远处的敌人造成的伤害提升，最多15%。

en_description: 测试，基础回能量-100%
cn_description: 测试，基础回能量-100%

en_description: 测试，百分之百暴击
cn_description: 测试，百分之百暴击

en_description: Max HP +20. Restore 1 HP on Room Entry.
cn_description: 生命值上限提高20点，进入房间时回复1点生命值

en_description: All Magic Card Cooldown Rate +8%.
cn_description: 所有魔卡的冷却速率提高8%

en_description: Dash Cooldown -20%.
cn_description: 冲刺的冷却时间降低20%

en_description: Crit Chance +5% when dealing damage.
cn_description: 造成伤害时的暴击率提高5%

en_description: All Attributes +2.
cn_description: 全属性+2

en_description: Cannot Revive
cn_description: 无法复活

en_description: Cannot Attack
cn_description: 无法攻击

en_description: Cannot Dash, Movement Speed -90%
cn_description: 无法冲刺,移动速度降低90%

en_description: Cannot Cast Magic Cards
cn_description: 无法释放魔卡

en_description: Takes escalating damage each second
cn_description: 每秒受到逐渐增高的伤害
